text.en: As quoted from Misbah al-Mutahajjid
text.ar: تعقيب صلاة الصبح ـ عن مصباح المتهجد ـ :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ علَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَٱهْدِنِي لِمَا ٱخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahdini lima ukhtulifa fihi mina alhaqqi bi-idhnika

translation.en: and guide me, by Your permission, to the right about which discrepancies have taken place.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ تَهْدي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
segments.transliteration: innaka tahdi man tasha'u ila siratin mustaqimin

translation.en: Verily, You guide him whom You wish to a straight path.

text.en: Repeat the following invocation ten times:
text.ar: وَتَقول عشر مَرات :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the consenting and pleased Successors,
with the best of Your blessings,
and confer upon them the best of your favors.
Peace be upon them
and their souls and bodies.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon them.

text.en: This invocation of God’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household has been also reported to be said on Fridays with a great reward.
text.ar: وهذهِ الصلاة واردة يَومَ الجمعة أيضاً عصراً بفضل عظيم

text.en: Also, say the following:
text.ar: وقُل أيضاً :

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أَحْيِنِي عَلى ما أَحْيَيْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طالِبٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ahyini `ala ma ahiyayta `alayhi `aliyya bna abi talibin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me live carrying the conducts on which You made `Ali the son of Abu-Talib live

segments.arabic: وَأَمِتْنِي عَلى ما ماتَ عَلَيْهِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طالِبٍ عليه‌السلام
segments.transliteration: wa amitni `ala ma mata `alayhi `aliyyu bnu abi talibin `alayhi alssalamu

translation.en: and make me die on the principles for which `Ali the son of Abu-Talib—peace be upon him—died.

text.en: Also, repeat the following statements one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah and I repent before Him.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

translation.en: I beseech Allah for good health.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

translation.en: I seek Allah’s protection against Hellfire.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

translation.en: I ask Him for Paradise.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

translation.en: I ask Allah for the Paradisiacal Women.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ٱلْمُبينُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu almaliku alhaqqu almubinu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah the King and evident Truth.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

text.en: Recite Surah al-Tawhid
text.ar: سورة التوحيد

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: May Allah send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّه ِوَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi walhamdu lillahi wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbar wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,all praise be to Allah,there is no god save Allah Allah is the Greatest and there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: one hundred times:
text.ar: وقُل مئة مرة :

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ كَانَ وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu kana wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass and there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: You may then say the following:
text.ar: ثُمَّ قُل :

translation.en: O Allah, I have begun this morning seeking refuge with Your invulnerable security

segments.transliteration: alladhi la yutawalu wa la yuhawalu

translation.en: that is neither touched nor caught

segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ghashimin wa tariqin

translation.en: against the evil of all oppressive and domineering ones

segments.arabic: مِنْ سَائِرِ مَنْ خَلَقْتَ وَمَا خَلَقْتَ
segments.transliteration: min sa'iri man khalaqta wa ma khalaqta

translation.en: from among all Your animate and inanimate creatures
both the silent and the speaking;
and being in protection against all terrifying things;
and being in the complete garb
of my loyalty to the Household of Your Prophet;

segments.arabic: مُحْتَجِباً مِنْ كُلِّ قَاصِدٍ لِي إِلىٰ أَذِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: muhtajiban min kulli qasidin li ila adhiyyatin

translation.en: and veiling myself against all those who intend harm to me,
behind an impervious wall,
which is my sincerity in the profession of their (Divinely commissioned) right (of leadership)
and my adherence to their Rope,

segments.transliteration: muqinan anna alhaqqa lahum wa ma`ahum

translation.en: and bearing with certainty that the Right is theirs, with them,
in them, and amid them.
I thus accede to those whom they accept
and depart those whom they depart.
O Allah, protect me, in the names of them,

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ مَا أَتَّقيهِ يَا عَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: min sharri kulli ma attaqihi ya `azimu

translation.en: against the evil of all that which I fear, O All-great.

segments.arabic: حَجَزْتُ ٱلأَعَادِيَ عَنِّي بِبَدِيعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ

translation.en: I am restraining the enemies against me through the Originator of the heavens and the earth;

segments.transliteration: inna ja`alna min bayni aydihim saddan

translation.en: “And We have set a bar before them
and a bar behind them,
and (thus) have covered them so that they see not.”

text.en: This supplication, which is reported from Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) at the Night of Mabit, is advisably said each morning and evening.
text.ar: وهذا دعاء يدعى به في كُل صباحٍ ومَساء وهوَ دعاء أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام لَيلَة المبيت

text.en: In Tahdhib al-Ahkam (by Shaykh al-Tusi), it is reported that whoever repeats the following litany ten times after the Dawn Prayers, Almighty Allah will save him from blindness, insanity, leprosy, poverty, and (house) demolition or dotage:
text.ar: وروي في التهذيب أن مَن قال بعد فريضة الفجر عشر مرات :

translation.en: All glory be to Allah, the All-great and in praise of Him;

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: and there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: Shaykh al-Kulayni reports Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) as saying: Whoever repeats the following litany seven times after the Dawn and Sunset Prayers, Almighty Allah will saved him from seventy kinds of misfortune the least of which are flatulence, leprosy, and insanity; and his name will be erased from the list of the condemned ones, if it was listed there, and will be added to the list of the happy ones:
text.ar: وروى الكليني عَن الصادق عليه‌السلام أنّ من قال بعد فريضة الصبح وفريضة المَغرب سَبع مَرات :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah the All-compassionate, the All-merciful;

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

text.en: دفع الله عنهُ سَبعين نوعاً مِن أنواع البَلاءِ أهونها الريح والبرص والجنون ، وإن كانَ شقيا مُحي مِن الاَشقياء ، وكتب مِنَ السعداء

Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is also reported to have said that one who desires to enjoy both the worldly life and the Next World, and one who has eye ache, should utter the following supplicatory prayer after the Dawn and Sunset Prayers:
text.ar: وروي عنهُ عليه‌السلام أيضاً للدنيا والآخرة ، ولوجع العين هذا الدعاء بَعدَ فريضتي الصبح والمَغرب :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin `alayka

translation.en: O Allah, I do beseech You, in the name of the right of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad that is incumbent upon You
to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and to give light to my insight,
make me discerning in my religion,
have conviction in my heart,
sincerity in my deeds,
safety in my self,
vastness in my sustenance,
and perpetual thankfulness for You as long as you keep me alive.

text.en: In ‘Uddat al-Dai, Shaykh Ibn Fahad reports Imam Ali ibn Musa al-Rida(a.s.) to have said: Whoever says the following statement after the Dawn Prayer, will have all his requests made easy-to-gain for him and will be saved by Almighty Allah against every thing that aggrieves him:
text.ar: أقول : روى الشيخ ابن فهد في عدّة الدّاعي عَن الرضا عليه‌السلام أنّ مَن قالَ عقيب صلاة الصبح هذا القول ما سَأل الله حاجة إِلاّ تيسرت لَهُ وكفاهُ الله ما أهمه :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Household.
“I confide my cause unto Allah.
Surely, Allah is Seer of His slaves.
So, Allah warded off from him the evils which they plotted.”
“There is no god save You. Be You Glorified!
Lo! I have been a wrongdoer.

segments.transliteration: fastajabna lahu wa najjaynahu mina alghammi

translation.en: Then, We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish.
Thus do We save the believers.”
“Allah is Sufficient for us! Most Excellent is He in Whom we trust.

segments.transliteration: fanqalabu bini`matin mina allahi wa fadlin

translation.en: So, they returned with grace and favor from Allah,
and no harm touched them.”
Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither strength nor power save with Allah.

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ مَا شَاءَ ٱلنَّاسُ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu la ma sha'a alnnasu

translation.en: Only that which Allah, but not people, wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: مَا شَاءَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنْ كَرِهَ ٱلنَّاسُ
segments.transliteration: ma sha'a allahu wa in kariha alnnasu

translation.en: Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass even if people detest it.
Sufficient for me is the Lord against the lorded.
Sufficient for me is the Creator against the creatures.
Sufficient for me is the Sustainer against the sustained.
Sufficient for me is Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Sufficient for me is He Who is sufficient for me.
Sufficient for me is He Who has been always sufficient for me.

segments.arabic: حَسْبِي مَنْ كَانَ مُذْ كُنْتُ لَمْ يَزَلْ حَسْبِي
segments.transliteration: hasbi man kana mudh kuntu lam yazal hasbi

translation.en: Sufficient for me is He Who had been since eternity and still sufficient for me.

segments.transliteration: hasbiya allahu la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: “Allah suffices me. There is no god save Him.
In Him have I put my trust,
and He is the Lord of the Tremendous Throne.”

text.en: Our master scholar, Shaykh al-Nuri, in his book of Dar al-Salam, has recorded on the authority of his mentor FathAli al-Sultanabadi that Shaykh MuhammadSadiq al-Iraqi had lived in harsh poverty for a long time without finding any solution for his state until he saw, in dream, that he was in a valley where there was an enormous tent with a dome over it. As he asked about the lord of that tent, he was answered that it was owned by Imam al-Mahdi, the Awaited - the protecting shelter and the relief of the deprived ones - may Allah hasten his reappearance. He therefore hurried towards that tent and complained about his poverty, asking the Imam (a.s.) to teach him a supplication that would relieve him from his grief and save him from his misfortunes. The Imam, having heard his complaint, instructed him to visit the tent of one of his offspring. He therefore left the Imam’s tent and headed for the tent to which he was guided. When he reached there, he saw Sayyid Muhammad al-Sultanabadi sitting in his prayer-place while he was engaged in uttering supplications and litanies. He greeted him and told him about his story with the Imam. The Sayyid therefore taught him a supplication that would relieve him from poverty and bring him good sustenance.
text.ar: أقول : حكى شيخنا ثقة الاسلام النوري نوّر الله مرقده في كتاب دار السلام عَن شَيخِهِ المَرحوم العالم الرباني الحاج المَولى فتح علي السلطان آبادي (رض) ، أن الآخوند المَولى محمد صادق العراقي كانَ في غاية الضيق والعسرة والضرّاء ومضى عليه كذلك زمان فلم يجد من كربِهِ فَرَجاً ولا من ضيقه مَخْرَجاً إلى أَن رأى لَيلَة في المَنام كأنه في وادٍ يتراءى فيه خيمة عظيمة عَلَيها قبة فسأل عَن صاحبها فقيل فيه الكهف الحصين وغياث المُضطرّ المستكين الحُجة القائم المهدي المُنتظر عجّل الله تعالى فرجه فَأسرع الذهاب إليها فلّما وافاهُ (صَلَواتُ الله عَلَيهِ) شكى عندهُ سوء حاله وسَأل عنهُ دعاءً يفرّج بِهِ همّه وَيَدفع بِهِ غمّه فأحاله عليه‌السلام إلى سيّد من ولْده وإلى خيمته فخرج مِن حضرته ودخل في تلك الخيمة فرأى السيّد السند والحبر المُعتمد العالم الاَمجد المؤيد جناب السَيد محمد السلطان آبادي قاعداً على سجّادته مشغولا بدعائه وقراءته فذكر لَهُ بَعدَ السلام ما أحال عليه حجّة الملك العّلام فعلّمه دعاءً يستكفي بِهِ ضيقه وَيَستجلب بِهِ رزقه فانتبه من نومه والدعاء محفوظ في خاطره فقصد بيت جناب السيد وكانَ قَبلَ تلك‌الرؤيا نافراً عنهُ لوجهٍ لايذكرهُ فلمّا أتاهُ ودخل عليه رآه كَما في النوم على مصلاه ذاكراً

text.en: When the man woke up, he found that he had learnt that supplication by heart; therefore, he hurried to the house of the Sayyid and found him in the same state that he had seen in the dream. As if the Sayyid had already known about the dream, he welcomed the man and smiled in his face. The man hence asked the Sayyid about that supplication and the Sayyid answered him. Immediately after saying the supplication persistently, the man became so wealthy that fortune covered him from all sides.
text.ar: ربّه مستغفراً ذنبه فلما سلّم عليه اجابه وتبسم في وجهه كأنّه عرف القضية فسأل عنهُ ما سأل عنهُ في الرؤيا ، فعلّمه مِن حينه عين ذاك الدعاء فدعا به في قليل من الزمان فصبّت عليه الدنيا مِن كلّ ناحية ومكان ، وكانَ المَرحوم الحاج المَولى فتح علي رض يثني على السَيد ثناءً بليغا وقد ادركه في أواخر عمره وتلمّذ عليه شطراً من الزمان ، وأمّا ما علّمه السيد في اليقظة والمنام فثلاثة أمور :

text.en: HajjFathAli al-Sultanabadi used to praise the Sayyid so laudably. For some time, he studied under him. The following three matters were taught by the Sayyid to that man:
text.ar: الأول : أَن يذكر عقيب الفَجر سَبعين مرّة واضعاً يدهُ على صدره :

text.en: (1) He taught him that he, after the Dawn Prayers, should put his hand on his chest and repeat seventy times the phrase of:

translation.en: O Greatest Judge

text.en: (2) He taught him to regularly say the following supplicatory prayer that, as is recorded in al-Kafi, the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) taught to one of his companions who had been afflicted by disease and poverty. Soon after that, the man recovered health and got rid of poverty. The supplication is this:
text.ar: الثاني : أَن يواظب على هذا الدعاء المَروي في الكافي وَقَد عَلَّمَهُ النَّبيِّ صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله رجلا مِن أصحابِهِ مُبتلى بالسقم والفقر فما لبث أَن ذهَب عنهُ السقم والفقر :

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاََّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ

translation.en: I put my trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah, Who has not taken a wife or a son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: and Who has not have a partner in the kingdom,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun min aldhdhulli

translation.en: and Who has not have a helper to save Him from disgrace;
and magnify Him with all magnificence.

text.en: Dh'ur and Asr TaqeebatRecited after the obligatory salat.
Before zuhr
Dh'ur Taqeeb
Dhu'r more.
Asr Taqeeb
Asr more
Common /Res
1.From Misbah al-Mutahajjid:

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ ٱلْحَلِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu alʿazimu alhalimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah, the All-great and Most Forbearing.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيـمِ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu rabbu alʿarshi alkarimu

translation.en: There is no god save Allah, the Lord of the Throne of Honor.
All praise be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
O Allah, I ask You for the motives of Your mercy,
the determining causes of Your forgiveness,
the advantage of each act of kindness,
and the safeguarding against each and every sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَدَعْ لِي ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tadaʿ li dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not leave any of my offenses unforgiven,
any of my misfortunes unrelieved,
any of my ailments unhealed,
any of my defects uncovered,
any (item of my) sustenance not including (me),
any fear (that I experience) unsecured,
any evil (that comes upon me) uncontrollable,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَاجَةً هِيَ لَكَ رِضاً وَلِيَ فيهَا صَلاَحٌ إِلاَّ قَضَيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la hajatan hiya laka ridan wa liya fiha salahun illa qadaytaha

translation.en: and any need that achieves Your satisfaction and my benefit unanswered.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
(please) Respond, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: 2.Repeat the following litany reportedfrom Imam Ja'far Sadiq (peace be upon him)ten times:

translation.en: With Allah I seek protection,
in Allah I trust,
and upon Allah I rely.

text.en: 3. Dua from Imam Musa Al Kazim(as):

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ عَظُمَتْ ذُنُوبِي فَأَنْتَ أَعْظَمُ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma in ʿazumat dhunubi fa-anta aʿzamu

translation.en: O Allah! if my sins are enormous, surely You are more Tremendous.

segments.transliteration: wa in kabura tafriti fa-anta akbaru

translation.en: If my transgression has exceeded all limits, surely You are Greater.

segments.transliteration: wa in dama bukhli fa-anta ajwadu

translation.en: If my stinginess has perpetuated, surely You are more Generous.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱغْفِرْ لِي عَظيمَ ذُنُوبِي بِعَظِيمِ عَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir li ʿazima dhunubi biʿazimi ʿafwika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) forgive my enormous sins out of Your tremendous pardon,
forgive my limitless transgression out of Your obvious generosity,
and impede my stinginess by the virtue of Your magnanimity.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَة فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.
There is no god save You.
I pray Your forgiveness and I repent before You.

text.en: Recite Surah Naba
4.Syeda Fatima Zahra (peace be upon her) Dua after Dhuhr Salat
Recitations :-5 |Imam Ridha(as)6 |& 7 |8 Imam Ali(as) |9. Ya Same Kulle Saut|

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمّ صَلّ عَلٰي مُحَمّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمّدٍ وَ عَجّلْ فَرَجَهُمْ.

translation.en: 6.Imam Ridha (peace be upon him)is reported to have said, 'When you finish the Dhuhr Prayer, raise your hands and say:'

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ اِنّي اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allahuma Inni Ataqqarabu Elaika B-Jodik Wa-Karamik,

translation.en: O Allah, I seek closeness towards you through your goodness and generosity,

segments.transliteration: Wa Ataqarabu Elaika B Mohammed Abdik Wa-Rasoolik,

translation.en: and I closeness towards you through Muhammad; your servant and messenger,

segments.arabic: وَاَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ بِمَلائِكَتِكَ الْمُقَرَّبينَ وَاَنْبِيَائِكَ وَرُسُلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa Ataqarabu Elaika B Malaikatik Al Moqarabeen Wa Anbiyaik Wa Rosolik,

translation.en: and I seek closeness towards you through your closest most dearest angles, prophets and apostles;

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّد عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ وَعَلى آلِ مُحَمَّد،
segments.transliteration: An Tosali Ala Mohammed Abdik Wa Rasoolik Wa Ala Aali Mohammed,

translation.en: That to send your blessings onto Muhammed your servant and messenger and onto Muhammad's progeny,

segments.arabic: وَاْنَ تُقيلَني عَثْرَتي وَتَسْتُرَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوبي وَتَغْفِرَها لي،
segments.transliteration: Wa An Tqilni Asrati Wa-Tastor Ala Znoobi Wa Tagfirha Lee

translation.en: That so you let go of what I have stumbled upon and that you cover my sins and you forgive them for me

segments.arabic: وَتَقْضِيَ لي حَوائجي وَلا تُعَذِّبْني بِقَبيحٍ كانَ مِنّي،
segments.transliteration: Wa Taqdi Lee Hawaeiji Wa La Toazbni B Qabeehin Kaan Min-ni

translation.en: and grant me my needs and do not torment me due to the filth of what was done by me,

segments.transliteration: Fa Inna Afwaka Wa Joodak Yasaoni

translation.en: For your mercy and generosity suffices me
As you are capable to do all things

segments.arabic: يَا اَهْلَ التَّقْوٰى وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ اَنْتَ مَوْلَايَ وَ سَيِّدِيْ فَارْزُقْنِيْ اَنْتَ خَيْرٌ لِيْ مِنْ اَبِيْ وَ اُمِّيْ وَ مِنَ النَّاسِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ بِيْ اِلَيْكَ فَقْرٌ وَ فَاقَةٌ وَ اَنْتَ غَنِيٌّ عَنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيْمِ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰى اِخْوَانِهِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ الْاَئـِمَّةِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ وَ تَسْتَجِيْبَ دُعَائِيْ وَ تَرْحَمَ تَضَرُّعِيْ وَ اصْرِفْ عَنِّيْ اَنْوَاعَ الْبَلَاءِ يَا رَحْمٰنُ.
segments.transliteration: Yaa Ahlat Taqwaa Wal Maghferate Yaa Arhamar Raahemeena Anta Mawlaaya Wa Sayyedee Far Zuqnee Anta Khayrun Lee Min Abee Wa Ummee Wa Menan Naase Ajma-E’ena Bee Elayka Faqrun Wa Faaqatun Wa Anta Ghaniyyun A’nnee As-Aloka Be-Wajhekal Kareeme Wa As-Aloka An Tosalleya A’laa Mohammadin Wa Aale Mohammadin Wa A’laa Ikhwaanehin Nabiyyeena Wal A-Immatit Taahereena Wa Tastajeeba Do-A’aa-Ee Wa Tarhama Tazarro-E’e Was Rif A’nnee Anwaa-A’l Balaa-E Yaa Rahmaan.

translation.en:
O the worthiest of being feared and the Lord of forgiveness! O most Merciful! You are my Master and my Lord, provide me sustenance as You are to me better than my father and my mother and all the people. Unto You I am poor and needy, and You are needless.
 I ask You by the name of Your generous face, and I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad and upon his brothers, the Prophets, and the pure Imams, and to accept my prayers, and have mercy upon my acquiescence, and take away from me all sorts of tribulations, O Beneficent!

text.en: 8.Imam Ali(as) prayer after noon prayer

segments.arabic: « اللّهُمَّ ، إنِّي أَتَقَرَّبً إلَيَْكَ بِجُودِكَ ، وَكَرَمِكَ ، وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ ، وَأَتَقَرَّبُ إلَيْكَ بِمَلَائِكَتِكَ المُقَرَّبِينَ ، وَأَنْبِيَائِكَ المُرْسَلِينَ ، وَبِكَ.

translation.en: « O Allah, I draw near to You with Your generosity and I draw near to You through Muhammad Your servant and Messenger, and I draw near to You with Your close angels, Your messenger prophets, and with You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ ، أَنْتَ الغَنِّى عَنِّي ، وَبي الفَاقَةُ إلَيْكَ ، وَأَنْتَ الغَنِيُ ، وَأَنَا الفقيرُ

translation.en: O God, You are the One who is needless of me, and I am in need of You, and You are the Rich, and I am poor.

segments.arabic: إلَيْكَ أقلْتني مِنْ عَثْرَتي ، وَسَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوبي ، فَاقْضِ اليَوْمَ حاجتي ، ولا تُعَذّبْني بِقَبِيحِ ما تَعْلَمُ مِنِّي ، بَلْ عَفْوُكَ وَجُودُكَ يَسَعُني .. »

translation.en: You have lifted me up from my stumble, and covered my sins, so fulfill my need today, and do not torture me due to what is ugly that you know of me, but your forgiveness and your presence are enough for me.. »

segments.arabic: « يا أَهْلَ التَقْوَى ، وَيَا أَهْلَ المَغْفِرَةِ ، يا بِرُّ يا رَحِيمُ ، أَنْتَ أَبرُّ بي مِنْ أَبي ، وَأُمِّي ، وَمِنْ جَمِيعِ الخَلَائِقِ ، إقْبَلْني بِقَضَاءِ حَاجَتي ، مُجَاباً دُعَائي ، مَرْحُوماً صَوْتي ، قَدْ كَشَفْتَ أَنْوَاعَ البَلَاءِ عَنِّي .. »
segments.transliteration: "O people of piety, O people of forgiveness, O righteousness, O merciful, you are more honorable to me than my father, my mother, and all creatures. Accept me by fulfilling my needs and answering my supplications.” Have mercy on my voice, you have revealed all kinds of afflictions from me"

translation.en: 9.Invocation "Ya Samia Kulle Saut"

segments.arabic: يا سامِعَ كُلِّ صَوْتٍ ،يا جامِعَ (كُلِّ فَوْتٍ) ،يا بارِئَ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ ،

translation.en: O' He who hear all voice, O' He who gathered every thing, O' He who created soul after death,

segments.arabic: يا باعِثُ ،يا وارِثُ ،يا سَيِّدَ السَّادَةِ ،يا إِلهَ الْآلِهَةِ ،

translation.en: O' the causer, O' the Inheritor, O' master of the masters, O' God of gods,

segments.arabic: يا جَبَّارَ الْجَبابِرَةِ ،يا مَلِكَ الدُّنْيا وَالْآخِرَةِ ،

translation.en: O' The Mighty over the oppressors, O' The king of this world and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic:
يا رَبَّ الْأَرْبابِ ،
 يا مَلِكَ الْمُلُوكِ

translation.en: O' the Lord of the lords, O' the King of the kings,

segments.arabic:
يا بَطَّاشُ ، يا ذَا الْبَطْشِ الشَّديدِ ،
 يا فَعَّالاً لِما يُريدُ ،

translation.en: O' the vigorous, O' He who attain extreme vigorous, O' He who did what He wishes,

segments.arabic: يا مُحْصِيَ عَدَدِ الْأَنْفاسِ وَنَقْلِ الْأَقْدامِ ،

translation.en: O' He who knows the number of breaths and movement of feet,

segments.arabic: يا مَنِ السِّرُّ عِنْدَهُ عَلانِيَةٌ ،يا مُبْدِئُ ، يا مُعيدُ .

translation.en: O' He who to Him all secrets are visible, O' the starter, O' He who returns every thing.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّكَ عَلى خِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ،وَبِحَقِّهِمُ الَّذي أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ عَلى نَفْسِكَ ،

translation.en: I requested from You by the sake of your right over the best among Your creatures and for the sake of their right you have made incumbent on Yourself

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ السَّلامُ ،وَأَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ بِفِكاكِ رَقَبَتي مِنَ النَّارِ ،وَأَنْجِزْ لِوَلِيِّكَ وَابْنِ نَبِيِّكَ الدَّاعي إِلَيْكَ بِإِذْنِكَ ،

translation.en: to send Your blessing on Muhammad and members of his house and to grant me the rescue of my neck from the Hell fire, execute for Your good friends from the descendant of Your Prophet, the callers to Your course with Your permission,

segments.arabic: وَأَمينِكَ في خَلْقِكَ ،وَعَيْنِكَ في عِبادِكَ ،وَحُجَّتِكَ عَلى خَلْقِكَ ،عَلَيْهِ صَلَواتُكَ وَبَرَكاتُكَ وَعْدَهُ .

translation.en: Your trustee among Your creatures, Your sight among Your servants, Your proof among Your creatures, may Your peace and blessing be upon him.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ أَيِّدْهُ بِنَصْرِكَ ،وَانْصُرْ عَبْدَكَ ،وَقَوِّ أَصْحابَهُ وَصَبِّرْهُمْ ،

translation.en: O' Allah! Support him with Your assistance and assist Your servant, empowered his companions and grant them patience

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لَهُمْ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطاناً نَصيراً ،وَعَجِّلْ فَرَجَهُ ،وَأَمْكِنْهُ مِنْ أَعْدائِكَ وَأَعْداءِ رَسُولِكَ ،يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمينَ .
segments.transliteration: Open for them a protected authority and hasten his relief, let him prevail over Yours and Your Prophet's enemies, O' the Most Merciful of the merciful.

translation.en: The Post-Afternoon ('Asr) Prayer Litanies.

text.en: 2. Post Asr dua as is quoted from Misbah al-Mutahajjid:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I pray the forgiveness of Allah; there is no god save Him,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,
the All-compassionate, the All-merciful,
and the Lord of Majesty and Honor.
And I ask Him to accept my repentance,
like His acceptance of the repentance of a slave who is submissive, acquiescent,
poor, miserable,
despondent, dejected, seeking refuge (with Him),

segments.arabic: لاَ يَمْلِكُ لِنَفْسِهِ نَفْعَاً وَلاَ ضَرّاً
segments.transliteration: la yamliku linafsihi nafʿan wa la darran

translation.en: not controlling for himself any harm or profit,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ مَوْتاً وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ نُشُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa la mawtan wa la hayatan wa la nushuran

translation.en: and not controlling death nor life nor raising (the dead) to life.

text.en: 3. You may then say the following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic:
ا
َللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَشْبَعُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni aʿudhu bika min nafsin la tashbaʿu

translation.en: O Allah, I surely seek Your protection against a self that never has enough,
a heart that does not feel apprehension,
knowledge that does not avail,
a prayer that is not accepted,
and a supplication that is not responded.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ ٱلْيُسْرَ بَعْدَ ٱلْعُسْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka alyusra baʿda alʿusri

translation.en: O Allah, I surely beseech You for easiness after difficulty,
relief after misfortune,
and comfort after hardship.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.
There is no god save You.
I pray Your forgiveness and repent before You.

text.en: 4.ReciteSura Asr

5. Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) is reported as saying: Anyone who implores Almighty Allah's forgiveness(i.e. astaghfirullaha) seventy timesafter the `Asr Prayer will have seven hundred of his sins forgiven.

6.Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (al-Jawad) (peace be upon him) is also reported as saying: Anyone who recitesSurah al-Qadr (No. 97) ten timesafter the `Asr Prayer will be granted the reward of the deeds of all creatures on that day.
7.From Sahifa Radhvia

translation.en: Praise is for Allah.

text.en: 8."After performing Asr prayerseek forgiveness from Allah seventy-seven times (77)
9.ReciteSyeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after Asr Salat From Sahifa Fatimiya
10.Dua 'Asharaatis also recommended and the best time for this supplication is the time after the `Asr Prayers on Fridays.
11.Another Asr Dua "Allhumma Rabis samawat was sab"

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمٰوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَ رَبَّ الْاَرَضِيْنَ السَّبْعِ وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ مَا تَحْتَهُنَّ وَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ

translation.en: "Oh Allah! The Lord of seven heavens, and the Lord of seven earths, and whatever is in them, and whatever is between them, and whatever is beneath them, and the Lord of tremendous throne.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ جِبْرَآئِيْلَ وَ مِيْكَائِيْلَ وَ اِسْرَافِيْلَ وَ رَبَّ السَّبْعِ الْمَثَانِيْ وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيْمِ وَ رَبَّ مُـحَمَّدٍ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهٖ خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ

translation.en: And the Lord of Gabriel, Michael and Israfeel, and the Lord of Sab-e-Masani (surah Al-Fateha), and the Lord of tremendous Quran; and the Lord of Muhammad, the l

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْاَعْظَمِ الَّذِيْ بِهِ تَقُوْمُ السَّمٰوَاتُ وَ الْاَرْضُ وَ بِهٖ تُـحْيِي الْمَوْتٰى وَ تَرْزُقُ الْاَحْيَا وَ تُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ بَيْنَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِ وَ بِهٖ اَحْصَيْتَ عَدَدَ الْآجَالِ وَ وَزْنَ الْـجِبَالِ وَ كِيْلَ الْبِحَارِ

translation.en: I ask Thee by Thy mightiest name, by Whom heavens and earth are sustained, and by Whom the dead are given life and the living are provided with sustenance, and the gathered, and the scattered are gathered, and by Whom are encompassed the number of the spans of life, and the weight of mountains, and the measure of oceans.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ يَا مَنْ هُوَ كَذٰلِكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اَنْ تَفْعَلَ بِيْ كَذَا وَ كَذَا.
segments.transliteration: Oh one! Who are like this, I ask Thee to Shower unbounded blessing on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad and do for me such and such (in the place of ‘such and such’ ask for you need)."

translation.en: 12.Additonal Asr dua

segments.arabic:
---
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الطَّيِّبَاتِ وَتَرْكَ الْمُنْكَرَاتِ وَفَكَاكَ خِيرَتِي، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمَنَا وَتَتُوبَ عَلَيْنَا وَتَتَوَفَّنَا غَيْرَ مَفْتُونِينَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-alukat’t’ayyibaati wa tarkal munkaraati wa fi’-kak khayraati an taghfira lanaa wa tarh’amanaa wa tatooba a’laynaa wa tawaffanaa ghayra maftoonin birah’matika yaa arh’amar raah’imeen

translation.en: O Allah, I ask you to make me do pious deeds, and that which is lawful, prevent me from ding that which is forbidden, let me do that which is good; protect us have pity on us, admit us to your mercy, and cause us to die without ever having been seduced to evil, by your mercy, O the most merciful

text.en: 13. Invocation of Imam Kazim (a.s.) after Asr prayers for the Reappearance of Imam-e-Zamaan (a.t.f.s.)

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،اَلْاَوَّلُ وَالْاٰخِرُ وَالظَّاهِرُالْبَاطِنُ،

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, the first and the last, the apparent, the Inward,

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،اِلَيْكَ زِيَادَةُ الْاَشْيَاۤءِ وَنُقْصَانُهَا،

translation.en:
You are God, there is no any other deity except You,
 unto You the increase and decrease of all things,

segments.arabic: وَاَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،خَلَقْتَ الْخَلْقَ بِغَيْرِ مَعُوْنَةٍ مِنْ غَيْرِكَ،وَلَاحَاجَةٍ اِلَيْهِمْ،

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, You create the creations without helping hand from other than You and You are not in need of them;

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،مِنْكَ الْمَشِيَّةُ وَاِلَيْكَ الْبَدْءُ۔

translation.en: You are God, there is no any other deity except You, all wishes from You and unto You all the initiation.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،قَبْلَ الْقَبْلِ وَخَالِقُ الْقَبْلِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, before the previous and the creator of the previous,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤاِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،بَعْدَ الْبَعْدِ وَخَالِقُ الْبَعْدِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any deity except You, after afterward the creator of afterward,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،تَمْحُوْ مَا تَشَاۤءُ وَتُثْبِتُ وَعِنْدَكَ اُمُّ الْكِتَابِ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any deity except You, You erase and establish what ever You wishes and with You the essence of the Book,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّاۤ اَنْتَ،غَايَةُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَوَارِثُهُ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, the Goal and the Inheritor of every thing,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،لَايَعْزُبُ عَنْكَ الدَّقِيْقُ وَلَا الْجَلِيْلُ،

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, both small and mighty are not far away from You,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اللهُ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ،لَايَخْفٰى عَلَيْكَ اللُّغَاتُ،وَلَاتَتَشَابَهُ عَلَيْكَ الْاَصْوَاتُ۔

translation.en: You are God there is no any other deity except You, there is no any language hidden to You and voices are not similar to You.

segments.arabic: كُلَّ يَوْمٍ اَنْتَ فِيْ شَاْنٍ،لَايَشْغَلُكَ شَاْنٌ عَنْ شَاْنٍ،عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَاَخْفٰى،دَيَّانُ الدِّيْنِ،مُدَبِّرُ الْاُمُوْرِ،

translation.en: Every day You are at Your duty and a duty did not disturb You from another, the Knower of all hidden and concealed things, the owner of Religion, the director of all things,

segments.arabic: بَاعِثُ مَنْ فِي الْقُبُوْرِ،مُحْيِ الْعِظَامِ وَهِيَ رَمِيْمٌ،

translation.en: He who raises those in the graves, He who gave life to bone after they have became decayed.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْمَكْنُوْنِ الْمَخْزُوْنِ،اَلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّوْمِ،اَلَّذِيْ لَايَخِيْبُ مَنْ سَاَلَكَ بِهِ،اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَاٰلِهِ،

translation.en: I requested from You by Your sheltered Name, the Eternal the Everlasting, who did not disappoint who ever call Him by His name, to send blessing on Muhammad and his family

segments.arabic: وَاَنْ تُعَجِّلَ فَرَجَ الْمُنْتَقِمِ لَكَ مِنْ اَعْدَاۤئِكَ،وَاَنْجِزْلَهُ مَا وَعَدْتَهُ،يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ۔

translation.en: and hasten the reappearance of Your retaliator from Your enemies and execute for him all You have promised him, O' the possessor of Magnificence and Honour.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِسُبْحَانَ اللهِ والْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلا إلهَ إلاَّ اللهُ واللهُ أَكْبَرُوَلا حَوْلَ ولا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ باللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ

translation.en: "Glory be to Allah, all praise is due to Him! There is no god but Allah.Allah is the greatest; and there is no might and no strength but from Allah, the most superior, the All-tremendous.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْغُدُوِّ وَالآصَالِ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ بِالْعَشِيِّ وَالإبْكَارِ فَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah at morning and evening.Glorify His purity when you enter upon the time of evening and morning.

segments.arabic: وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ فِي السَّموَاتِ والأَرْضِ وَعَشِيّاً وَحِينَ تُظْهِرُونَ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عمَّا يَصِفُونَ

translation.en: And to Him belongs praise in the heavens and the earth, at night fall and mid-day.Glory be to Allah and all honour for He is free from the stories ascribed (about Him).

segments.arabic: وَسَلاَمٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِينَ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be on His apostles. And all praise rightly belongs to Allah – Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ سُبْحَانَ ذِي العِزَّةِ والْجَبَرُوتِ سُبْحَان الحَيّ الَّذِي لا يَمُوتُ

translation.en: Glory be to possessor of the dominion and the Kingdom. Glory be to possessor of might and invincibility. Glory be to the Living, the one Who will never die.

segments.arabic:
سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْقَائِمِ الدَّائِمِ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ سُبْحَانَ الْعَلِيِّ الأَعْلى سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالى
 سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلائِكَةِ والرُّوحِ.

translation.en: Glory be to the All-Self-existent, the Everlasting, Glory be to the Living the Self-subsistent. Glory be to the All-high, the Most High. Glory be to Him and exalted be He, All-glory and All-holy, our Lord and the Lord of Angels and spirit.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّ ذَنْبِي أَمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِعَفَوِكَ وَخَوْفِي أَمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِأَمْنِكَ وَفَقْرِي أمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِغِنَاكَ وذُلّي أمْسى مُسْتَجِيراً بِعِزّكَ،

translation.en: Oh Allah, surely my sin seeks the refuge of Thy pardon; and my fear seeks the refuge of Thy peace; and my indigence seeks the refuge of Thy self-sufficiency; and my abasement seeks the refuge of Thy exaltation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ واغْفِرْ لي وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.

translation.en: Oh Allah! Bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, and pardon me, and have mercy on me, for surely Thou art the Praised and the Glorious.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ تَمَّ نُورُكَ فَهَدَيْتَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَعَظُمَ حِلْمُكَ فَعَفَوْتَفَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَجْهُكَ رَبَّنَا أَكْرَمُ الْوُجُوهِ وَجَاهُكَ أَعْظَمُ الْجَاهِ وَعَطِيَّتُكَ أَفْضَلُ الْعَطَايَا تُطَاعُ

translation.en: Oh Allah! as Thy light has guided me, so all praise is due to Thee; and by the bounty of Thy clemency pardon me, so all praise is due to Thee Oh our Lord! Thou art the Most Generous of the generous and Thy Splendour is greater than all splendour, and Thy gift is greater in merit than all gifts.

segments.arabic: ربَّنَا وَتَشْكُرُ وَتُعْصى فَتَغْفِرُ وَتُجِيبُ الْمُضْطَرَّ وَتَكْشِفُ الضُّرَّ وَتُنْجِي مِنَ الْكَرْبِ وَتُغْني الْفُقِيرَوَتَشْفي السَّقِيمَ ولا يُجَاري آلاءَكَ أَحَدٌ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

translation.en: Thou thank those who obey thee and forgive when disobeyed, and grants the supplication of one in distress, and removes the harm, and rescues from affliction, and enriches the indigent, and cures the ailing, and nobody can recompense for any of Thy blessings. Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!".
O He Who has sealed the Prophethood with Muhammad,
Allah may bless him and his Household,

segments.arabic: إِخْتِمْ لِي فِي يَوْمِي هٰذَا بِخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: ikhtim li fi yawmi hadha bikhayrin

translation.en: (please) seal with goodness this day of mine,
this month of mine,
this year of mine,
and my entire lifetime.

text.en: 15.Imam Ali Naqi(as) supplication after the Asr Prayer

translation.en: O You Who have risen high and become great.
And You subdued and overcame.
And You overcame and subdued.

segments.transliteration: Yaa man ghalabta fa 'azumta bi qudratika,

translation.en: O You Who became mighty and great through Your power.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بَسَطْتَ ظِلَّكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ،

translation.en: O You Who have spread Your shadow over Your creation.
And bestowed Your blessings upon Your servants.
I ask You, O Severe in punishment.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَنْتَقِمُ بِقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِلْحَادِ،
segments.transliteration: Yaa man yantaqimu bi qudratihi min ahlil ilhaadi,

translation.en: O You Who avenges with His power against the people of disbelief.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ وَلِيِّكَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ،
segments.transliteration: As'aluka bihaqqi waliyyika 'Aliyyi bni Abi Talib,

translation.en: I ask You by the right of Your guardian, Ali ibn Abi Talib.

segments.arabic: وَأَتَوَسَّلُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ فِي قَضَاءِ حَوَائِجِي،
segments.transliteration: Wa atawassalu bihi ilayka fi qada'i hawa'iji,

translation.en: And I seek his intercession with You to fulfill my needs.

segments.transliteration: Wa an tarhama Muhammadan wa Aala Muhammadin,

translation.en: And that You have mercy on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
And help me to fulfill my needs.
And to perform my supererogatory prayers and obligations.

segments.transliteration: Wa birri ikhwaani, wa tamaami taa'atika,

translation.en: And to be kind to my brothers and complete in Your obedience.
O Most Merciful of the merciful.

text.en: 16. You may then do the thanksgiving prostration.(sajda Shukr)

translation.en: O Allah, when You called at me, I responded to Your call,
performed the prayer prescribed by You,
and dispersed through the land as You have ordered me to do.
So, I beseech You to make me, out of Your favoring, work in obedience to You,
avoid disobedience to You,
and gain sufficient sustenance, in the name of Your mercy.

text.en: As soon as it is midday say the following It is reported that Imam al-Baqir (`a) instructed Muhammad ibn Muslim to keep on saying this as it keeps his eyes from haram

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,
there is no god save Allah,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَلاَ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh sahibatan wa la waladan

translation.en: and all praise is due to Allah, Who has not taken a wife or a son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: and Who has not a partner in the kingdom,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun min aldhdhulli

translation.en: and Who has not a helper to save Him from disgrace;
and magnify Him with all magnificence.

text.en: - Recite 8 Units/ Rak'ats (2 X 4 )Nafilah( Supererogatory) Noon Prayer - Recommended before Zuhr  In the first two units, say the Takbir statement seven times & say,

translation.en: I pray for Allah's protection from Satan, the accursed.

text.en: Recite Surah al-Faatihah and S al-Tawhid in the first unit and S al-Fatihah and Surah al-Kafirun (No. 109) in the second. Upon accomplishment, you may repeat the Takbir statements three times, Tasbih al-Zahra', and then say the following prayer:

translation.en: O Allah, I am weak;
so, (please) strengthen my weakness in the course of Your pleasure,
lead my forelock to goodness,
cause faith to be the utmost of my pleasure,

segments.transliteration: wa barik li fima qasamta li

translation.en: bless for me that which You have decided for me,

segments.arabic: وَبَلِّغْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ كُلَّ ٱلَّذِي ارْجُو مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ballighni birahmatika kulla alladhi arju minka

translation.en: make me attain, by means of Your mercy, all that which I wish from You,
and appoint love for me,
delight for the believers,
and a covenant with You.

text.en: You may then stand up to offer next couple of units as exactly as the previous couple except that you may utter one statement of Takbir instead of seven.You may then offer another couple of units as

translation.en: O Allah, Lord of this perfect supplication
and established prayer,

segments.arabic: بَلِّغْ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: balligh muhammadan salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: (please) assign to Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household,
the rank, right of mediation,
excellence, and advantage.
With Allah do I commence,
from Allah do I seek success,

segments.arabic: وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ اتَوَجَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bimuhammadin salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi atawajjahu

translation.en: and in the name of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household, do I turn my face (towards Allah).

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي بِهِمْ عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهاً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ وَمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: wajʿalni bihim ʿindaka wajihan fi alddunya wal-akhirati wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: and, in their names, make me worthy of regard in this world and in the Hereafter, and of those drawn near to You.

text.en: You may recite the Surahs with low voice except for the basmalah. It is preferred to recite S al-Fatihah and S al-Qadr at the first unit and Sura al-Fatihah and Surah al-Tawhid at the second. After the tashahhud statement in the second unit, you may add the following:

translation.en: And (please) admit his intercession and raise his rank.

text.en: Magrib and Isha TaqeebatRecited after the obligatory salats.
Sunset
Magrib
Magrib more
Sy.Fatima(sa) Magrib
Gufailah-Nafila
Isha
Isha more
Sy.Fatima(sa) Isha
Common-Res
1.After reciting Tasbih al-Zahra', say the following invocation of blessings:

segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna ʿala alnnabiyyi

translation.en: "Surely, Allah and His angels bless the Prophet.

segments.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْليماً﴾
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu ʿalayhi wa sallimu tasliman

translation.en: O you who believe! Call for Divine blessings on him and salute him with a becoming salutation."
O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad the Prophet,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala dhurriyyatihi wa ʿala ahli baytihi

translation.en: upon his offspring, and upon his Household.

text.en: 2.From Imam Moosa al Kazim (a.s)without talking to anyone, say the following7 times:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيِمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi alʿaliyyi alʿazimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-high, the All-great.

text.en: 3.Then, repeat the following doxology three times:

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذي يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi yafʿalu ma yasha'u

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who does whatever He desires,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafʿalu ma yasha'u ghayruhu

translation.en: and none else can ever do whatever one desires save Him.
O Allah! I beseech You for the motives of Your mercy,
the determining causes of Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَٱلنَّجَاةَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِنْ كُلِّ بِلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: walnnajata mina alnnari wa min kulli baliyyatin

translation.en: deliverance from Hellfire and all misfortunes,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْفَوْزَ بِٱلْجَنَّةِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ في دَارِ ٱلسَّلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: walfawza biljannati walrridwani fi dari alssalami

translation.en: winning Paradise,Divine Contentment in the Abode of Peace,

segments.arabic: وَجَوَارِ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa jiwari nabiyyika muhammadin ʿalayhi wa alihi alssalamu

translation.en: and the vicinity of Your Prophet Muhammad—peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ فَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ma bina min niʿmatin faminka

translation.en: O Allah, You are certainly the source of each and every favor that covers us.
There is no god save You.
I pray Your forgiveness and I repent before You.

text.en: 5. After Magrib salat recite: Allahuma Ajirna minan naar

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ أَجِرْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ سَالِمِيْنَ وَ أَدْخِلْنَا الْجَنَّةَ بِسَلَامٍ آمِنِيْنَ

translation.en: O Allah help us to depart from life of this world in safety and save us from fire and make us enter Paradise with peace and safety.

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَفَّنا مُسْلِمِيْنَ وَ أَلْحِقْنَا بِالصَّالِحِيْنَ بِفَضْلِکَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: And make us die in Thy submission and include us with the righteous, I beseech You by Thy grace and mercy on us, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful! ".

translation.en: 6.Then, say the following litany "Subhanaka:
All glory be to You. There is no god save You.
Forgive my sins all in all,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ كُلَّهَا جَمِيعاً إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba kullaha jamiʿan illa anta

translation.en: for none can forgive all sins save You.

text.en: ReciteSurah Waqiyah
Recite Sunset Duas
Before Magrib Between Adhan and Iqamah, say the following

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the coming of Your night,
the departure of Your daylight,
the presence of Your prayers,
the voices of Your supplicants,
and the glorification of Your angels,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and to accept my repentance.
You are verily, the Oft-Returning, the Most Merciful

segments.arabic: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
segments.transliteration: Fa Subhaanal laahi heena tumsoona wa heena tusbihoon

translation.en: So glorify Allah when you enter evening and when you rise at dawn.

segments.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَعَشِيًّا وَحِينَ تُظْهِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: Wa lahul hamdu fis samaawaati wal ardi wa 'ashiyyanw wa heena

translation.en: To Him belongs all praise in the heavens and the earth, at nightfall and when you enter noontime.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوْبِ وَ الْأَبْصَارِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلىٰ دِيْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma muqallibal-quloobi wal-absaar, thabbit qalbee ‘alaa deenik.

translation.en: "O Allah, Controller of hearts and eyes, keep my heart firm on Your religion."

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنِي وَ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَّدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
segments.transliteration: Wa laa tuzigh qalbee ba’da idh hadaytanee wahab lee min ladunka rahmatan innaka antal-wahhaab.

translation.en: "Do not let my heart go astray after You have guided me. Grant me mercy from Yourself. Truly, You are the Bestower."
"By Your mercy, protect me from the Fire."

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ امْدُدْ لِي فِيْ عُمُرِي وَ اَوْسِعْ عَليَّ فِيْ رِزْقِي وَانْشُرْ عَلَيَّ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma amdud lee fee ‘umree wa awsi’ ‘alayya fee rizqee wanshur ‘alayya rahmatak.

translation.en: "O Allah, give me a long life, increase my provision, and cover me with Your mercy."

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ كُنْتُ عِنْدَكَ فِي أُمِّ الْكِتَابِ شَقِيًّا فَاجْعَلْنِي سَعِيْدًا
segments.transliteration: Wa in kunta ‘indaka fee ummil-kitaabi shaqeeyyan faj’alnee sa’eeda.

translation.en: "And if, in Your record, I am written as unhappy, then change it to happiness."

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ تَمْحُوْ مَا تَشَاءُ وَ تُثْبِتُ وَ عِنْدَكَ أُمُّ الْكِتَاب
segments.transliteration: Fa innaka tamhoo ma tashaao wa tuthbito wa ‘indaka ummul-kitaab.

translation.en: "For You erase what You will, and You affirm what You will. With You is the Master Record."

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ʿalayka

translation.en: O Allah, I do beseech You, in the name of the right of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad that is incumbent upon You

segments.transliteration: salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and to give light to my insight,
make me discerning in my religion,
have conviction in my heart,
sincerity in my deeds,
safety in my self,
vastness in my sustenance,
and perpetual thankfulness for You as long as you keep me alive.

text.en: 11.-Six Duas below (a-f ) from 'Nafila App' -

segments.arabic: أَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ اكْتُبَا رَحِمَكُمَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: Astaa‘eedhu billaahi minash-shaytaani r-rajeem, uktubaa rahimakumallaah.

translation.en:
"I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan. Write me as one of those whom You have shown mercy to, "
Then say
In the Name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.

segments.arabic: أَمْسَيْتُ وَأَصْبَحْتُ بِاللَّهِ مُؤْمِنًا عَلَى دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ (صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ) وَسُنَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: Amsaytu wa-aṣbaḥtu bi-llāhi mu’minan ‘alā dīni Muḥammadin (ṣallā Allāhu ‘alayhi wa-ālih) wa-sunnatih.

translation.en: I ended my evening and began my morning as a believer in Allah, upon the religion of Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) and his tradition.

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى دِينِ عَلِيٍّ (عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ) وَسُنَّتِهِ وَعَلَى دِينِ فَاطِمَةَ (عَلَيْهَا السَّلَامُ) وَسُنَّتِهَا
segments.transliteration: Wa-‘alā dīni ‘Aliyyin (‘alayhi as-salām) wa-sunnatih, wa-‘alā dīni Fāṭimata (‘alayhā as-salām) wa-sunnatihā.

translation.en: And upon the religion of ʿAlī (peace be upon him) and his tradition, and upon the religion of Fāṭimah (peace be upon her) and her tradition.

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى دِينِ الْأَوْصِيَاءِ صَلَوَاتُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَسُنَنِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: Wa-‘alā dīni al-awṣiyā’i ṣalawātu Allāhi ‘alayhim wa-sunanihim.

translation.en: And upon the religion of the Successors, may Allah's blessings be upon them, and their traditions.
I believe in their secrets and their openness, in their unseen and their witnessed presence.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ فِي لَيْلَتِي هَذِهِ وَيَوْمِي هَذَا
segments.transliteration: Wa-asta‘īdhū bi-llāhi fī laylatī hādhihi wa-yawmī hādhā.

translation.en: And I seek refuge in Allah during this night of mine and this day of mine.

segments.arabic: مِمَّا اسْتَعَاذَ مِنْهُ مُحَمَّدٌ وَعَلِيٌّ وَفَاطِمَةُ وَالْأَوْصِيَاءُ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: Mimmā ista‘ādha minhu Muḥammadun wa-‘Aliyyun wa-Fāṭimatu wa-l-awṣiyā’u ṣallā Allāhu ‘alayhim.

translation.en: From that which Muhammad, ʿAlī, Fāṭimah, and the Successors (peace be upon them) sought refuge from.

segments.arabic: وَأَرْغَبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ فِيمَا رَغِبُوا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa-arghabu ilā Allāhi fīmā raghibū fīhi.

translation.en: And I desire from Allah what they desired.

segments.arabic: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa-lā ḥawla wa-lā quwwata illā bi-llāh.

translation.en: And there is no power and no strength except through Allah.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي يُولِجُ اللَّيْلَ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ النَّهَارَ فِي اللَّيْلِالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا وَقَبَ لَيْلٌ وَغَسَقَ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا لَاحَ نَجْمٌ وَخَفَقَ.
segments.transliteration:
Bismillahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
Alhamdu lillahi alladhi yulij al layla fee alnnahari wayuliju alnnahara fee allayli
Alhamdu lillahi kullama waqaba laylun waghassaq waalhamdu lillahi kullama laha najmun wakhafaq.

translation.en: "In the Name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Compassionate. Praise be to Allah, who causes the night to enter into the day and causes the day to enter into the night. Praise be to Allah every time the night falls and every time the stars twinkle."

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِأَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِقُدْرَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِمَغْفِرَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِسُلْطَانِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌوَأَعُوذُ بِكَرَمِ اللَّهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِجَمْعِ اللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ وَشَيْطَانٍ مَرِيدٍوَكُلِّ مُغْتَالٍ وَسَارِقٍ وَعَارِضٍ وَمِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ وَالْهَامَّةِ والْعَامَّةِوَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ أَوْ كَبِيرَةٍ بِلَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍوَمِنْ شَرِّ فُسَّاقِ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ وَ فُجَّارِهِمْوَمِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِوَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ رَبِّي آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ.
segments.transliteration:
Bismillahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
A'oothu bi'izzati Allahi wa a'oothu bi qudrati Allahi wa a'oothu bi maghfirati Allahi wa a'oothu bi rahmati Allahi wa a'oothu bi sultani Allahi alladhi huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer
Wa a'oothu bi karami Allahi wa a'oothu bi jami'i Allahi min sharri kulli jabbarin 'aneedin wa shaytanin mareedinWa kulli mughtalin wa saariqin wa 'aridhin wa min sharri alssammati wa alhamaati wa al'amaatiWa min sharri kulli dabbatin sagheeratin aw kabeeratin biallayli aw naharWa min sharri fusaqi al'arabi wa al'ajami wa fujjarihimWa min sharri fasqati aljinni wa al'insiWa min sharri kulli dabbatin rabbi akhithun bina'siyatiha inna rabbi 'ala siratin mustaqeemin.

translation.en:
In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.
I seek refuge in the might of Allah, His power, His forgiveness, His mercy, and His sovereignty, over all things.I seek refuge in the generosity of Allah and in the gathering of Allah, from the evil of every arrogant and stubborn tyrant, and from the tempting devil.From the harm of every murderer, thief, and robber, and from the evil of the scorpions, snakes, and pests, small and large, by day and by night.From the harm of the wicked Arabs and non-Arabs, and from their wickedness.
From the harm of the sinful jinn and mankind.From the harm of every creature whose forelock my Lord grasps. Indeed, my Lord is on a straight path.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِأُعِيذُ نَفْسِي وَذُرِّيَّتِي وَأَهْلَ بَيْتِيوَمَالِي بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍوَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ وهي العوذة الَّتِي عَوَّذَ بِهَا جَبْرَائِيلُ الْحَسَنَ وَالْحُسَيْنَ (عليهما السَّلامُ).
segments.transliteration: Bismillah al-Rahman al-RahimU'iithu nafsi wa dhurriyyati wa ahli baytiWa mali bikalimatillah al-tammati min kulli shaytaninWa hamma wa min kulli 'aynin lammah wa hiya al-'awdah allati 'awwadha biha Jibrailu al-Hasan wa al-Husayn (alayhima al-salam).

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate.I seek refuge for myself, my family, my possessions, and my household, with the perfect words of Allah, from every devil, mischief, and the evil eye.

segments.arabic: يَا شَدِيدَ الْمَحَالِ يَا عَزِيزاً ذَلَّلْتَ بِعِزَّتِكَ جَمِيعَ مَا خَلَقْتَ اكْفِنِي شَرَّ (فُلانٍ بِمَا شِئْتَ).
segments.transliteration: Ya Shadid al-Mahal, Ya Azizan Dhallalta bi 'izzatika jami'a ma khalaqta, ikfini sharra [fulanin] bima shi'ta.

translation.en: O Powerful One who makes the impossible possible!O Mighty One, by Your might, You have brought everything into submission. Suffice me against all evil...

text.en: 12.Syeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after magrib Salat-Seperate page

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يَبْلُغُ مَدْحَتَهُ الْقَائِلُوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee laa yablogho midhatahul qaaeloona,

translation.en: Praise be to the one, Whose praise cannot be encompassed together even by all the speakers.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُحْصِيْ نَعْمَاءَهُ الْعَادُّوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yohsee na’maa-ahul a’addoona,

translation.en: All praise is for God, whose bounties cannot be counted by even all those, who count.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُؤَدِّيْ حَقَّهُ الْمُجْتَهِدُوْنَ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yo-addee haqqahul mujtahedoona,

translation.en: All praise is for God, whose right cannot be restored even by those, who try to restore it.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْاَوَّلُ وَ الْاٰخِرُ، وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الظَّاهِرُ وَ الْبَاطِنُ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa elaaha illal laahul awwalo wal aakhero, wa laa elaaha illal laahuz zaahero wal baateno,

translation.en: And there is no god, except Allah, the first and the last. And there is no god, except Allah, the apparent and the hidden.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْمُحْيِيْ الْمُمِيْتُ، وَ اللهُ اَكْبَرُ ذُوْ الطَّوْلِ وَ اللهُ اَكْبَرُ ذُوْ الْبَقَاءِ الدَّائِمِ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa elaaha illal laahul mohyil momeeto, wal laaho akbaro zut tawle wal laaho akbaro zul baqaa-id daa-eme.

translation.en: And there is no god, except Allah, the giver of life and death. And Allah is the greatest and owner of rewards and Allah is the greatest and He is eternally present.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَا يُدْرِكُ الْعَالِمُوْنَ عِلْمَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahil lazee laa yudrekul a’alemoona i’lmahu,

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, whose knowledge cannot be perceived even by the learned;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَسْتَخِفُّ الْجَاهِلُوْنَ حِلْمَهٗ، وَ لَا يَبْلُغُ الْمَادِحُوْنَ مِدْحَتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa yastakhifful jaaheloona hilmahu, wa laa yabloghul maadehoona midhatahu,

translation.en: and whose knowledge cannot be labeled as ordinary even by the ignorant;and the praisers cannot reach upto the end of His extolling

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يَصِفُ الْوَاصِفُوْنَ صِفَتَهٗ وَ لَا يُحْسِنُ الْخَلْقُ نَعْتَهٗ.
segments.transliteration: wa laa yaseful waasefoona sefatahu wa laa yohsenul khalqo na’tahu.

translation.en: and the describers cannot describe Him. And even all creatures together cannot describe Him fully.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ ذِيْ الْمُلْكِ وَ الْمَلَكُوْتِ، وَ الْعَظَمَةِ وَ الْجَبَرُوْتِ (وَ الْعِزِّ) وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءِ، وَ الْبَهَاءِ وَ الْجَلَالِ، وَ الْمَهَابَةِ وَ الْجَمَالِ، وَ الْعِزَّةِ وَ الْقُدْرَةِ وَ الْحَوْلِ وَ الْقُوَّةِ، وَ الْمِنَّةِ وَ الْغَلَبَةِ، وَ الْفَضْلِ وَ الطَّوْلِ، وَ الْعَدْلِ وَ الْحَقِّ وَ الْخَلْقِ وَ الْعَلَاءِ، وَ الرِّفْعَةِ وَ الْمَجْدِ، وَ الْفَضِيْلَةِ وَ الْحِكْمَةِ وَ الْغِنَاءِ وَ السَّعَةِ وَ الْبَسْطِ وَ الْقَبْضِ، وَ الْحِلْمِ وَ الْعِلْمِ، وَ الْحُجَّةِ الْبَالِغَةِ وَ النِّعْمَةِ السَّابِغَةِ وَ الثَّنَاءِ الْحَسَنِ الْجَمِيْلِ
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahe zil mulke wal malakoote, wal a’zamate wal jabaroote (wal i’zze) wal kibreyaa-e, wal bahaa-e wal jalaale, wal mahaabate wal jamaale, wal i’zzate wal qudrate wal hawle wal quwwate, wal minnate wal ghalabate, wal fazle wat tawle, wal a’dle wal haqqe wal khalqe wal a’laa-e, war rif-a’te wal majde, wal fazeelate wal hikmate wal ghenaa-e was sa-a’te wal baste wal qabze, wal hilme wal i’lme, wal hujjatil baaleghate wan ne’matis saabeghate was sanaa-il hasanil jameele

translation.en: All praise be for Allah, Who is the owner of kingdom and dominion; owner of the great and tremendous force; owner of honor and greatness;owner of elegance of majesty and awe and beauty and powerand strength and force and might and favor and clout andgoodwill and nobility and justice and truth;and good manners and greatness, exaltation and enormity, and excellence and wisdom;and self-sufficiency and wideness; and tying up and opening; and forbearance and knowledge; and matured reasoning and perfect bounty; and beautiful and elegant creation; and are the noble bounties.

segments.arabic: وَ الْاٰلَاءِ الْكَرِيْمَةِ، مَلِكِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ وَ الْجَنَّةِ وَ النَّارِ، وَ مَا فِيْهِنَّ تَبَارَكَ (اللهُ) وَ تَعَالٰى.
segments.transliteration: wal aalaa-il kareemate, malekid dunyaa wal aakherate wal jannate wan naare, wa maa feehinna tabaarakal (laaho) wa ta-a’alaa.

translation.en: Only He is ruler in the world and hereafter, and Paradise and Hell and what is between them. He is bountiful and also the highest.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ عَلِمَ اَسْرَارَ الْغُيُوْبِ، وَ اطَّلَعَ عَلٰى مَا تَجِنُّ الْقُلُوْبُ فَلَيْسَ عَنْهُ مَذْهَبٌ وَ لَا مَهْرَبٌ، وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الْمُتَكَبِّرِ فِيْ سُلْطَانِهِ الْعَزِيْزِ فِيْ مَكَانِهِ، الْمُتَجَبِّرِ فِيْ مُلْكِهِ، الْقَوِيِّ فِيْ بَطْشِهِ، الرَّفِيْعِ فَوْقَ عَرْشِهِ، الْمُطَّلِعِ عَلٰى خَلْقِهٖ، وَ الْبَالِغِ لِمَا اَرَادَ مِنْ عِلْمِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee a’lema asraaral ghoyoobe, wat tala-a’ a’laa maa tajinnul qoloobo falaysa a’nho mazhabun wa laa mahrabun, wal hamdo lillaahil motakabbere fee sultaanehil a’zeeze fee makaanehil, motajabbere fee mulkehil, qawiyye fee batshehir, rafee-e’ fawqa a’rshehil, mutta-le-e’ a’laa khalqehi, wal baaleghe lemaa araada min i’lmehi.

translation.en: All praise be for Allah, Who is the knower of secrets of the unseen and is aware of the concealed secrets of the hearts; there is no scope to flee and run away from Him.All praise be for Allah, who is the owner of pride in His kingdom; who is honorable in his stage; and the owner of domination in His kingdom, who is powerful in His attacks; who is the owner of the loftinesses of His Throne; who is aware of the circumstances of His creatures; and has the capacity to reach upto what He has intended through His knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ بِكَلِمَاتِهٖ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ الشِّدَادُ، وَ ثَبَتَتِ الْاَرَضُوْنَ الْمِهَادُ، وَ انْتَصَبَتِ الْجِبَالُ الرَّوَاسِيْ الْاَوْتَادُ، وَ جَرَتِ الرِّيَاحُ اللَّوَاقِحُ، وَ سَارَ فِيْ جَوِّ السَّمَاءِ السَّحَابُ، وَ وَقَفَتْ عَلٰى حُدُوْدِهَا الْبِحَارُ، وَ وَجِلَتِ الْقُلُوْبُ مِنْ مَخَافَتِهٖ، وَ انْقَمَعَتِ الْاَرْبَابُ لِرُبُوْبِيَّتِهٖ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا مُحْصِيْ قَطْرِ الْمَطَرِ، وَ وَرَقِ الشَّجَرِ، وَ مُحْيِيْ اَجْسَادِ الْمَوْتٰى لِلْحَشْرِ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee bekalemaatehi qaamatis samaawaatush shedaado, wa sabatatil arazoonal mehaado, wan tasabatil jebaalur rawaasil awtaado, wa jaratir reyaahul lawaa-qeho, wa saara fee jawwis samaa-is sahaabo, wa waqafat a’laa hodoodehal behaaro, wa wajelatil qoloobo min makhaafatehi, wan qa-ma-a’til arbaabo le-roboobiyyatehi tabaarakta yaa mohsee qatril matare, wa waraqish shajare, wa mohyee ajsaadil mawtaa lil-hashre.

translation.en: All praise is for the one, through the support of whose words all seven hardest heavens and the softest earths are established.Through Him are fixed in the earth the tent pegs of mountains; and through His favors blow the winds that bloom the blossoms and in the atmosphere of the sky is established the excursion of the clouds; and the seas are stopped at their boundaries; and the hearts are trembling due to His fear.And the lords of the world are destroyed through His Lordship.Blessed are You, O counter of the drops of rain and the leaves and the enlivener of the dead bodies on Judgment Day.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْاِكْرَامِ، مَا فَعَلْتَ بِالْغَرِيْبِ الْفَقِيْرِ اِذَا اَتَاكَ مُسْتَجِيْرًا مُسْتَغِيْثًا؟ مَا فَعَلْتَ بِمَنْ اَنَاخَ بِفِنَائِكَ وَ تَعَرَّضَ لِرِضَاكَ وَ غَدَا اِلَيْكَ، فَجَثَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ، يَشْكُوْ اِلَيْكَ مَا لَا يَخْفٰى عَلَيْكَ؟ فَلَا يَكُوْنَنَّ يَا رَبِّ حَظِّيْ مِنْ دُعَائِيْ الْحِرْمَانُ، وَ لَا نَصِيْبِيْ مِمَّا اَرْجُوْ مِنْكَ الْخِذْلَانُ.
segments.transliteration: Subhaanaka yaa zal jalaale wal ikraame, maa fa-a’lta bil-ghareebil faqeere ezaa ataaka mustajeeran mustagheesan? maafa-a’ta beman anaakha be-fenaa-eka wa ta-a’rraza le-rezaaka wa ghadaa elayka, fajasaa bayna yadayka, yashkoo elayka maa laa yakhfaa a’layka? falaa yakoonanna yaa rarre hazzee min do-a’a-il hirmaano, wa laa naseebee mimmaa arjoo minkal khizlaano.

translation.en:
Praise be to You, O owner of majesty and nobility! 
That You have conducted with this poor destitute, who has come to take refuge in your court.And with the destitute, who has unloaded the baggage in your presence and is the seeker of your pleasure and has presented himself before You and has kneeled down before You and is seeking from You those things, which are not concealed upon You.So, now my share must not be deprivation and my fortune as compared to my hopes, should not be fixed as helplessness.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَزَلْ وَ لَا يَزُوْلُ كَمَا لَمْ يَزَلْ قَائِمًا عَلٰى كُلِّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ
segments.transliteration: yaa man lam yazal wa laa yazoolo kamaa lam yazal qaa-eman a’laa kulle nafsin bemaa kasabat

translation.en: O that God, who is present since eternity, and will endure like this forever and who is continuously guarding the deeds of the servants.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ اَيَّامَ الدُّنْيَا تَزُوْلُ، وَ شُهُوْرَهَا تَحُوْلُ، وَ سِنِيَّهَا تَدُوْرُ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man ja-a’la ayyaamad dunyaa tazoolo, wa shohoorahaa tahoolo, wa seniyyahaa tadooro.

translation.en: O one, who has made the days of the world, declining, its months on the stage of change and its years, center of rotation.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الدَّائِمُ لَا تُبْلِيْكَ الْاَزْمَانُ، وَ لَا تُغَيِّرُكَ الدُّهُوْرُ.
segments.transliteration: wa antad daa-emo laa tubleekal azmaano, wa laa toghayyerokad dohooro.

translation.en: You alone are that owner of permanence, whom the times cannot age and the passing times cannot create change in it.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ كُلُّ يَوْمٍ عِنْدَهٗ جَدِيْدٌ، وَ كُلُّ رِزْقٍ عِنْدَهٗ عَتِيْدٌ، لِلضَّعِيْفِ وَ الْقَوِيِّ وَ الشَّدِيْدِ، قَسَّمْتَ الْاَرْزَاقَ بَيْنَ الْخَلَائِقِ، فَسَوَّيْتَ بَيْنَ الذَّرَّةِ وَ الْعُصْفُوْرِ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man kullo yawmin i’ndahu jadeedun, wa kullo rizqin i’ndahu a’teediun, liz-za-e’efe wal qawiyye wash shadeede, qassamtal arzaaqa baynal khalaa-eqe, fasawwayta bayanz zarrate wal u’sfoore.

translation.en: O that being, for whom everyday is new and whose sustenance is ready for every weak, strong and severe; only You have distributed sustenance among all the creatures and have maintained equality between the ant and the bird.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا ضَاقَ الْمُقَامُ بِالنَّاسِ، فَنَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ ضِيْقِ الْمُقَامِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa zaaqal moqaamo bin-naase, fa-na-o’ozo beka min zeeqil moqaame.

translation.en: O God, when the earth straitens for people, I seek refuge from that straitness.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا طَالَ يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ عَلَى الْمُجْرِمِيْنَ، فَقَصِّرْ ذٰلِكَ الْيَوْمَ عَلَيْنَا كَمَا بَيْنَ الصَّلَاةِ اِلَى الصَّلَاةِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa taala yawmul qeyaamate a’lal mujremeena, faqassir zaalekal yawma a’laynaa kamaa baynas salaate elas salaate.

translation.en: O God, when Judgment Day prolongs for the sinners, make that day so short for me, like the gap between two prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِذَا اَدْنَيْتَ الشَّمْسَ مِنَ الْجَمَاجِمِ، فَكَانَ بَيْنَهَا وَ بَيْنَ الْجَمَاجِمِ مِقْدَارُ مِيْلٍ، وَ زِيْدَ فِيْ حَرِّهَا حَرَّ عَشْرِ سِنِيْنَ، فَاِنَّا نَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُظِلَّنَا بِالْغَمَامِ، وَ تَنْصِبَ لَنَا الْمَنَابِرَ وَ الْكَرَاسِيَّ نَجْلِسُ عَلَيْهَا وَ النَّاسُ يَنْطَلِقُوْنَ فِيْ الْمُقَامِ، اٰمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ezaa adnaytash shamsa menal jamaajeme, fakaana baynahaa wa baynal jamaajeme miqdaaro meelin, wa zayda fee harrehaa harra ashre seneena, fa-innaa nas-aloka an tozillanaa bil-ghamaame, wa tanseba lanal manaabera wal karaasiyya najleso a’layhaa wan naaso yantaleqoona fil maqaame, aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O God, when the sun begins to heat up and between the two there remains only distance of one mile, and in its heat there is increase of ten years, then we beseech You to bestow us the shade of the cloud of mercy and arrange the pulpit and chair for us upon which we may sit when people head to the stage of accounting. Amen, O Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ الْمَحَامِدِ، اِلَّا غَفَرْتَ لِيْ وَ تَجَاوَزْتَ عَنِّيْ وَ اَلْبَسْتَنِيْ الْعَافِيَةَ فِيْ بَدَنِيْ، وَ رَزَقْتَنِيْ السَّلَامَةَ فِيْ دِيْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: as-aloka allaahumma be-haqqe haazehil mahaamede, illaa ghafarta lee wa tajaawazta a’nnee wa albastanil a’afeyata fee badanee, wa razaqtanis salaamata fee deenee.

translation.en: I ask You, O God, by the right of these praises that You forgive all my sins and overlook them. Give me the garment of health and security in religion.

segments.arabic: فَاِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ، وَ اَنَا وَاثِقٌ بِاِجَابَتِكَ اِيَّايَ فِيْ مَسْاَلَتِيْ، وَ اَدْعُوْكَ وَ اَنَا عَالِمٌ بِاسْتِمَاعِكَ دَعْوَتِيْ، فَاسْتَمِعْ دُعَائِيْ، وَ لَا تَقْطَعْ رَجَائِيْ، وَ لَا تَرُدَّ ثَنَائِيْ وَ لَا تُخَيِّبْ دُعَائِيْ، اَنَا مُحْتَاجٌ اِلٰى رِضْوَانِكَ، وَ فَقِيْرٌ اِلٰى غُفْرَانِكَ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ وَ لَا اٰيِسٌ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ، وَ اَدْعُوْكَ وَ اَنَا غَيْرُ مُحْتَرِزٍ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ.
segments.transliteration: fa-innee as-aloka, wa anaa waasequn be-ejaabateka iyyaya fee mas-alatee, wa ad-o’oka wa anaa a’alemun bis-temaa-e’ka da’watee, fastame’ do-a’a-ee, wa laa taqta’ rajaa-ee wa laa tarudda sanaa-ee wa laa tokhayyib do-a’a-ee, anaa mohtaajun elaa rizwaaneka, wa faqeerun elaa ghufraaneka wa as-aloka wa laa aayesun min rahmateka, wa ad-o’oka wa anaa ghayro mohtarezin min sakhateka.

translation.en:
As I am asking You in the condition that I am confident of the fulfillment of my request and I supplicate with such reliance that You are listening to my voice; so now listen to my call and don't cut off my hope.

 Do not overturn my praise and glorification and do not make my entreaty hopeless.

 I am needful of your pleasure and beggar for your forgiveness. I

 ask You while I have not despaired of your mercy and I am supplicating in such fashion that I am not unveiled from your displeasure.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ فَاسْتَجِبْ لِيْ، وَ امْنُنْ عَلَيَّ بِعَفْوِكَ، وَ تَوَفَّنِيْ مُسْلِمًا، وَ اَلْحِقْنِيْ بِالصَّالِحِيْنَ،
segments.transliteration: rabbe fas-tajib lee, wam nun a’layya be-a’fweka, wa tawaffanee musleman, wa alhiqnee bis-saaleheena,

translation.en: Lord, accept my plea and send down your forgiveness for me; make me die a Muslim and join me with your righteous servants.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَمْنَعْنِيْ فَضْلَكَ يَا مَنَّانُ، وَ لَا تَكِلْنِيْ اِلٰى نَفْسِيْ مَخْذُوْلًا، يَا حَنَّانُ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe laa tamna’nee fazlaka yaa mannaano, wa laa takilnee elaa nafsee makhzoolan, yaa hannaano.

translation.en: O God, do not deprive me of your grace and nobility, O doer of good, and by separating me from Yourself, do not hand me over to my self, O doer of favor.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْ عِنْدَ فِرَاقِ الْاَحِبَّةِ صَرْعَتِيْ، وَ عِنْدَ سُكُوْنِ الْقَبْرِ وَحْدَتِيْ وَ فِيْ مَفَازَةِ الْقِيَامَةِ غُرْبَتِيْ، وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ مَوْقُوْفًا لِلْحِسَابِ فَاقَتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: rabbir ham i’nda feraaqil ahibbate sar-a’tee, wa i’nda sokoonil qabre wahdatee wa fee mafaazatil qeyaamate ghurbatee, wa bayna yadayka mawqoofan lil-hesaabe faaqatee.

translation.en: Lord, when the friends separate from us at the time of death, have mercy on my destruction and when I am interred in the grave, have mercy on my loneliness and when I appear in the stage of Judgment Day, have mercy on my alienity and when I stand before You in the stage of accounting, have mercy on my needfulness.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اَسْتَجِيْرُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَجِرْنِيْ، رَبِّ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَعِذْنِيْ (رَبِّ) اَفْزَعُ اِلَيْكَ مِنَ النَّارِ فَاَبْعِدْنِيْ، رَبِّ اَسْتَرْحِمُكَ مَكْرُوْبًا فَارْحَمْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe astajeero beka menan naare fa-ajirnee, rabbe a-o’ozo beka menan naare fa-a-i’znee (rabbe) af-ze-o’ elayka menan naare, fa-ab-i’dnee, rabbe as-tarhemoka makrooban farhamnee.

translation.en:
Lord, I seek refuge from Hell through You, so accord refuge to me and I seek salvation from Hell fire through You, so give me salvation. 

I am terrified of Hell, so keep me away from it; and I want your mercy in distress and sorrow, so have mercy on me.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا جَهِلْتُ فَاغْفِرْ لِي، (رَبِّ) قَدْ اَبْرَزَنِيْ الدُّعَاءُ لِلْحَاجَةِ اِلَيْكَ فَلَا تُؤْيِسْنِيْ، يَا كَرِيْمُ ذَا الْاٰلَاءِ وَ الْاِحْسَانِ وَ التَّجَاوُزِ.
segments.transliteration: rabbe astaghferoka lemaa jahilto faghfir lee, (rabbe) qad abrazanid do-a’aa-o lil-haajate elayka falaa toa-yisnee, yaa kareemo zal aalaa-e wal ehsaane wat tajaawoze.

translation.en: Lord, I seek forgiveness for my ignorance, so please forgive me. [Lord] my needs have taken me out and made me stand in the stage of supplication, so now don't disappoint me, O owner of nobility, favor, bounty and forgiveness.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِيْ يَا بَرُّ يَا رَحِيْمُ، اِسْتَجِبْ بَيْنَ الْمُتَضَرِّعِيْنَ اِلَيْكَ دَعْوَتِيْ وَ ارْحَمْ بَيْنَ الْمُنْتَحِبِيْنَ بِالْعَوِيْلِ عَبْرَتِيْ،
segments.transliteration: sayyedee yaa barro yaa raheemo, istajib baynal motazarre-e’ena elayka da’watee war ham baynal muntahebeena bil-a’weele a’bratee,

translation.en: My chief, O doer of good, O merciful, accept my supplication between all entreaties and among all complainants, have mercy on my tears.
