segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ فِيْ لِقَائِكَ يَوْمَ الْخُرُوْجِ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا رَاحَتِيْ، وَ اسْتُرْ بَيْنَ الْاَمْوَاتِ يَا عَظِيْمَ الرَّجَاءِ عَوْرَتِيْ، وَ اعْطِفْ عَلَيَّ عِنْدَ التَّحَوُّلِ وَحِيْدًا اِلٰى حُفْرَتِيْ، اِنَّكَ اَمَلِيْ وَ مَوْضِعُ طَلِبَتِيْ، وَ الْعَارِفُ بِمَا اُرِيْدُ فِيْ تَوْجِيْهِ مَسْاَلَتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: waj a’l fee leqaa-eka yamal khorooje menad dunyaa raahatee, was tur baynal amwaate yaa a’zeemar rajaa-e a’wratee, wa’ tif a’layya i’ndat tahawwole waheedan elaa hufratee, innaka amalee wa maw-ze-o’ talebatee, wal a’arefo bemaa oreedo fee tawjeehe mas-alatee.

translation.en: On the day I leave the world, deem my relief to be in your meeting and among all the dead, veil my defects, O my great center of hopes, when I am going to the grave alone, have mercy on me, O my support and the focus of my needs, and knower of the direction of my pleas.

segments.arabic: فَاقْضِ يَا قَاضِيَ الْحَاجَاتِ حَاجَتِيْ، فَاِلَيْكَ الْمُشْتَكٰى وَ اَنْتَ الْمُسْتَعَانُ وَ الْمُرْتَجٰى، اَفِرُّ اِلَيْكَ هَارِبًا مِنَ الذُّنُوْبِ فَاقْبَلْنِيْ، وَ اَلْتَجِأُ مِنْ عَدْلِكَ اِلٰى مَغْفِرَتِكَ فَاَدْرِكْنِيْ، وَ اَلْتَاذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ بَطْشِكَ فَامْنَعْنِيْ وَ اَسْتَرْوِحُ رَحْمَتَكَ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ فَنَجِّنِيْ،
segments.transliteration: faqze yaa qaazeyal haajaate haajatee, fa-elaykal mushtakaa wa antal musta-a’ano wal murtajaa, afirro elayka haareban menaz zonoobe faqbalnee, wa altaje-o min a’dleka elaa maghferateka fa-adriknee, wa altaazo be-a’fweka min batsheka fam-na’nee wa astar-weho rahmataka min e’qaabeka fanajjenee,

translation.en: O fulfiller of needs, fulfill my needs, my entreaty is towards You and only You are my helper and center of hope.I flee the sins and run towards You; from your justice I am coming into the refuge of your forgiveness, so come to my help.I seek the refuge of your forgiveness from chastisement, so give me security. And as opposed to your chastisement, I am seeker of your mercy, so save me from hell.

segments.arabic: وَ اَطْلُبُ الْقُرْبَةَ مِنْكَ بِالْاِسْلَامِ فَقَرِّبْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الْفَزَعِ الْاَكْبَرِ فَاٰمِنِّيْ، وَ فِيْ ظِلِّ عَرْشِكَ فَظَلِّلْنِيْ، وَ كِفْلَيْنِ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ فَهَبْ لِيْ، وَ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا سَالِمًا فَنَجِّنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ اِلَى النُّوْرِ فَاَخْرِجْنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: wa atlobul qurbata minka bil-islaame faqarribnee, wa menal fa-za-i’l akbare fa-aaminnee wa fee zille a’rsheka fazallilnee, wa kiflayne min rahmateka fahab lee, wa menad dunyaa saaleman fanajjenee, wa menaz zolomaate elan noore fa-akhrijnee.

translation.en: I seek proximity to You through Islam, so make me your proximate one and secure me from the terror of Judgment Day and accommodate me in the shade of your throne and bestow upon me both parts of your mercy and give me relief from the world with security and take me out from the darknesses convey me to the stage of effulgence.

segments.arabic: وَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَبَيِّضْ وَجْهِيْ، وَ حِسَابًا يَسِيْرًا فَحَاسِبْنِيْ وَ بِسَرَائِرِيْ فَلَا تَفْضَحْنِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa yawmal qeyaamate fa-bayyiz wajhee, wa hesaaban yaseeran fahaasibnee wa besaraa-eree falaa tafzahnee,

translation.en: Illuminate my face on Judgment Day and ease my accounting and do not expose me on the basis of my secrets.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلٰى بَلَائِكَ فَصَبِّرْنِيْ، وَ كَمَا صَرَفْتَ عَنْ يُوْسُفَ السُّوْءَ وَ الْفَحْشَاءَ فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّيْ، وَ مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لِيْ بِهٖ فَلَا تُحَمِّلْنِيْ.

translation.en: Bestow patience to me upon your trials and like You turned away evil and wantonness from Yusuf, turn it away from me as well. And don't impose the load of what I am not capable of.

segments.arabic: وَ اِلٰى دَارِ السَّلَامِ فَاهْدِنِيْ، وَ بِالْقُرْاٰنِ فَانْفَعْنِيْ، وَ بِالْقَوْلِ الثَّابِتِ فَثَبِّتْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ فَاحْفَظْنِيْ، وَ بِحَوْلِكَ وَ قُوَّتِكَ وَ جَبَرُوْتِكَ فَاعْصِمْنِيْ، وَ بِحِلْمِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ وَ سَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ فَنَجِّنِيْ، وَ جَنَّتَكَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ فَاَسْكِنِّيْ، وَ النَّظَرَ اِلٰى وَجْهِكَ فَارْزُقْنِيْ، وَ بِنَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ فَاَلْحِقْنِيْ، وَ مِنَ الشَّيَاطِيْنِ وَ اَوْلِيَائِهِمْ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِيْ شَرٍّ فَاكْفِنِيْ.
segments.transliteration: wa elaa daaris salaame fahdenee, wa bil-qur-aane fan-fa’nee, wa bil-qawlis saabete fasabbitnee, wa menash shaytaanir rajeeme fah-faznee, wa be-hawleka wa quwwateka wa jabarooteka fa’simnee, wa be-hilmeka wa i’lmeka wa sa-a’te rahmateka min jahannama fanajjenee, wa jannatakal firdawsa fa-askinnee, wan nazara elaa wajheka far-zuqnee, wa be-nabiyyeka mohammadin sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi fa-alhiqnee, wa menash sahyaateene wa awleyaa-ehim wa min sharre kulle zee sharrin fakfenee.

translation.en:
Guide me to the abode of Islam and make the Quran beneficial for me and make me steadfast on the constant statement; make me secure from the accursed satan. 

And protect me through your power and strength and force. 

Save me from Hell through your forbearance and knowledge. Settle me in the Firdos Paradise and make me see your blessed countenance and join me to your prophet, Muhammad and secure me from the satans and their friends and all mischief makers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اَعْدَائِيْ وَ مَنْ كَادَنِيْ بِسُوْءٍ اِنْ اَتَوْا بَرًّا فَجَبِّنْ شَجِيْعَهُمْ، فَضِّ جُمُوْعَهُمْ، كَلِّلْ سِلَاحَهُمْ، عَرْقِبْ دَوَابَّهُمْ، سَلِّطْ عَلَيْهِمُ الْعَوَاصِفَ وَ الْقَوَاصِفَ اَبَدًا حَتّٰى تُصْلِيْهِمُ النَّارَ، اَنْزِلْهُمْ مِنْ صَيَاصِيْهِمْ، وَ اَمْكِنَّا مِنْ نَوَاصِيْهِمْ اٰمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma wa a-a’daa-ee wa man kaadanee be-soo-in in ataw barran fajabbin sha-jee-a’hum, fazze jomoo-a’hum, kallil selaahahum, a’rqib dawaabbahum, sallit a’layhemul a’waa-sefa wal qawaasefa abadan hattaa tusleehemun naara, anzilhum min sayaaseehim wa amkinnaa min nawaaseehim aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O God, if my enemies and those, who deceive me, intend to cause distress, weaken the strength of their heart and disperse their gathering and blunt their weapons and make their mounts lifeless and send fast and furious storms on them, so much so that You send them to Hell. Take them out of their refuges and bestow their control to us, amen, O Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، صَلَاةً يَشْهَدُ الْاَوَّلُوْنَ مَعَ الْاَبْرَارِ وَ سَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِيْنَ وَ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ، وَ قَائِدِ الْخَيْرِ، وَ مِفْتَاحِ الرَّحْمَةِ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin, salaatan yash-hadul awwaloona ma-a’l abraare wa sayyedil mursaleena wa khaatamin nabiyyeena, wa qaa-edil khayre, wa miftaahir rahmate.

translation.en: O God, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, which is witnessed by the formers and the latters and the righteous that your prophet is the chief of messengers, seal of prophets, leader of the righteous and key of mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ، وَ الشَّهْرِ الْحَرَامِ، وَ رَبَّ الْمَشْعَرِ الْحَرَامِ وَ رَبَّ الرُّكْنِ وَ الْمَقَامِ، وَ رَبَّ الْحِلِّ وَ الْحَرَامِ، بَلِّغْ رُوْحَ مُحَمَّدٍ مِنَّا التَّحِيَّةَ وَ السَّلَامَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma rabbal baytil haraame, wash shahril haraame, wa rabbal mash-a’ril haraame wa rabbar rukne wal maqaame, wa rabbal hille wal haraame, balligh rooha mohammadin minnat tahiyyata was salaama.

translation.en: O God, Lord of the sacred house and the sacred month; O Lord of Masharul Haraam and owner of Rukn Maqaam and Hill and Haram. Convey our salutations and respects to the soul of His Eminence, Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُوْلَ اللهِ، سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَمِيْنَ اللهِ، سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللهِ، اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa rasoolal laah, salaamun a’layka yaa ameenal laahe, salaamun a’layka yaa mohammadab na a’bdil laahe, assalaamo a’layka wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Messenger of Allah (s); Peace be on you, O trustee of Allah; Peace be on you, O Muhammad bin Abdullah; Peace be on you, and His mercy and blessings.

segments.arabic: فَهُوَ كَمَا وَصَفْتَهٗ بِالْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ رَءُوْفٌ رَحِيْمٌ.
segments.transliteration: fahowa kamaa wasaftahu bil-moameneeena raoofun raheemun.

translation.en: As he is described by God to be merciful to the believers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَعْطِهٖ اَفْضَلَ مَا سَاَلَكَ، وَ اَفْضَلَ مَا سُئِلْتَ لَهٗ، وَ اَفْضَلَ مَا اَنْتَ مَسْئُوْلٌ لَهٗ اِلٰى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ، اٰمِيْنَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a-a’tehi afzala maa sa-alaka, wa afzala maa so-ilta lahu, wa afzala maa anta mas-oolun lahu elaa yawmil qeyaamate, aameena yaa rabbal a’alameen.

translation.en: O God, bestow on him best of the things that He has asked You for; or someone else has asked regarding him, or they would be asked till Judgment Day, amen, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Recite Salaat-ul Ghufaylah between Maghrib and Isha
Recite4 Rak'ats Nafilah (2X2)after Maghrib, 2 of which can be Ghufaylah

translation.en: O Allah, I surely beseech You in the name of Your Honorable Face,
Your Tremendous Name,
and Your Timeless Kingdom,

segments.transliteration: an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَ انْ تَغْفِرَ لِي ذَنْبِيَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
segments.transliteration: wa an taghfira li dhanbiya alʿazima

translation.en: and to forgive my enormous sin;

segments.arabic: إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلْعَظِيمَ إِلاَّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: innahu la yaghfiru alʿazima illa alʿazimu

translation.en: for none can forgive the enormous save the All-tremendous (Lord).
Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass!
There is no strength save with Allah.
I pray the forgiveness of Allah.

segments.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: sabbaha lillahi ma fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: Whatever is in the heavens and the earth declares the glory of Allah,
and He is the Mighty, the Wise.
His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth;
He gives life and causes death;

segments.transliteration: wa huwa ʿala kulli shay'in qadirun

translation.en: and He has power over all things.
He is the First and the Last
and the Ascendant (over all) and the Knower of hidden things,
and He is Cognizant of all things.
He it is who created the heavens and the earth
in six periods,
and He is firm in power;
He knows that which goes deep down into the earth
and that which comes forth out of it,
and that which comes down from the heaven
and that which goes up into it,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa maʿakum ayna ma kuntum

translation.en: and He is with you wherever you are;
and Allah sees what you do.
His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth;
and to Allah are (all) affairs returned.
He causes the night to enter in upon the day,
and causes the day to enter in upon the night,
and He is Cognizant of what is in the hearts.

segments.arabic: لَوْ انْزَلْنَا هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْآنَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ
segments.transliteration: law anzalna hadha al-qur'ana ʿala jabalin

translation.en: Had We sent down this Qur'an on a mountain,

segments.arabic: لَرَايْتَهُ خَاشِعاً مُتَصَدِّعاً مِنْ خَشْيَةِ اللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: lara'aytahu khashiʿan mutasaddiʿan min khashyati allahi

translation.en: you would certainly have seen it falling down, splitting asunder because of the fear of Allah,
and We set forth these parables to men
that they may reflect.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: huwa allahu alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: He is Allah besides Whom there is no god;
the Knower of the unseen and the seen;
He is the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: huwa allahu alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: He is Allah, besides Whom there is no god;
the King, the Holy,
the Giver of peace, the Granter of security, Guardian over all,
the Mighty, the Supreme, the Possessor of every greatness.
Glory be to Allah from what they set up with Him.
He is Allah the Creator, the Maker, the Fashioner;
His are the most excellent names;

segments.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: yusabbihu lahu ma fi alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: whatever is in the heavens and the earth declares His glory;
and He is the Mighty, the Wise.

text.en: As in other Nafila , it is sufficient to recite Surah al-Fatihah alone in each unit. It is advisable to recite the Surahs with audible voice,

translation.en: Thanks, thanks, thanks.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاََّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: bismillahi alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: In the Name of Allah save Whom there is no god,
the Knower of the unseen and the seen,
the All-beneficent, and the All-merciful.
O Allah, (please) take away from me grief and distress.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لِي عِلْمٌ بِمَوْضِعِ رِزْقِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu laysa li ʿilmun bimawadiʿi rizqi

translation.en: O Allah! verily, I lack acquaintance with the place of my sustenance;

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّمَا أَطْلُبُهُ بِخَطَرَاتٍ تَخْطُرُ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa innma atlubuhu bikhataratin takhturu ʿala qalbi

translation.en: rather, I am seeking it owing to ideas that come upon my mind.
I consequently wander in countries searching for it.
By doing such, I am as confused as the confounded,

segments.arabic: لاَ أَدْرِي أَفِي سَهْلٍ هَوُ أَمْ فِي جَبَلٍ
segments.transliteration: la adri afi sahlin huwa am fi jabalin

translation.en: since I do not know whether my sustenance lies in a plain, on a mountain,

segments.arabic: أَمْ في أَرْضٍ أَمْ في سَمَاءٍ
segments.transliteration: am fi ardin am fi sama'in

translation.en: on the ground, in the air,

segments.arabic: أَمْ فِي بَرٍّ أَمْ فِي بَحْرٍ
segments.transliteration: am fi barrin am fi bahrin

translation.en: on lands, in seas,
at whose hands,
or who the source of it is.

segments.transliteration: wa qad ʿalimtu anna ʿilmahu ʿindaka

translation.en: I have full knowledge that You know all these,
the causes of them are in Your Hands,
and it is You Who distribute it out of Your compassion
and cause it out of Your mercy.

segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah, please send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ يَا رَبِّ رِزْقَكَ لِي وَاسِعاً
segments.transliteration: wajʿal ya rabbi rizqaka li wasiʿan

translation.en: and make, O Lord, Your sustenance that is provided (by You) to me expansive,
my seeking for it easy for me,
and its source close to me.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُعَنِّنِي بِطَلَبِ مَا لَمْ تُقَدِّرْ لِي فيهِ رِزْقاً
segments.transliteration: wa la tuʿannini bitalbi ma lam tuqaddiru li fihi rizqan

translation.en: Please, do not fatigue me by seeking that which You have not decided for me to take,
because You are certainly in no need for tormenting me
while I am in full need for Your mercy.
(Please) Send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household
and confer liberally upon me, Your slave, out of Your graciousness.
You are surely the Lord of great favor.

text.en: 3.Then recite-"Allahumma Rabba alssamawati..":

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَمَا اظَلَّتْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alssamawati alssabʿi wa ma azallat

translation.en: O Allah, O Lord of the seven skies and whatever they shade,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba al-aradina alssabʿi wa ma aqallat

translation.en: Lord of the seven layers of the earth and whatever they carry,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba alshshayatini wa ma adallat

translation.en: Lord of the devils and whatever they mislead,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba alrriyahi wa ma dharat

translation.en: and Lord of the winds and whatever they winnow!
O Allah, O Lord of all things,
God of all things,
and Possessor of all things!

segments.arabic: انْتَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُقْتَدِرُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu almuqtadiru ʿala kulli shay'in

translation.en: You are Allah, the Omnipotent over all things.

segments.arabic: انْتَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلاوَّلُ فَلاَ شَيْءَ قَبْلَكَ
segments.transliteration: anta allahu al-awwalu fala shay'a qablaka

translation.en: You are Allah the Foremost; there is thus nothing before You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta al-akhiru fala shay'a baʿdaka

translation.en: You are the Last; there is thus nothing after You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alzzahiru fala shay'a fawqaka

translation.en: You are the Ascendant; there is thus nothing above You.

segments.transliteration: wa anta albatinu fala shay'a dunaka

translation.en: You are the Inward; there is thus nothing concealed from You.

segments.transliteration: rabba jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila

translation.en: O Lord of Gabriel, Michael, and Seraph!
O God of Abraham, Ishmael,
Isaac, Jacob, and the Tribes!

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to oversee me with Your mercy

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ احَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tusallit ʿalayya ahadan min khalqika

translation.en: and not to give any of Your creatures power over me
that I cannot stand.
O Allah, I am endearing myself to You; so (please) endear me to the others,
create affection for me among people,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ شَّيَاطِينِ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلإِنْسِ فَسَلِّمْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri shshayatini aljinn wal-insi fasallimni

translation.en: and keep me sound from the evil of the devils of jinn and men,
O Lord of the Worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa salli ʿala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: and bless Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: Nos 4 to 9 |Nos 10 - 16
4.The Isha Nafilah
The Nafila prayer, consists oftwo units and should be offered in the sitting positionit is recommended to recite Surah al-Waqi`ah (No. 56) in the first unit and Surah al-Tawhid in the second.
5.Imam Hassan Askari(as) has recommended recite Salwaat 100 timesfor any need after the Isha Nafila .

segments.arabic: يَا مُذِلَّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ وَمُعِزَّ كُلِّ ذَليلٍ قَدْ وَحَقِّكَ بَلِّغْ مَجْهُودِي
اَللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا مَنْ لَا تَرَاهُ الْعُيُونُ وَلَا تُخَالِطُهُ الظُّنُونُ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka yaa man laa tarahu al-'uyoonu wa laa tukhaalituhu ath-thunoonu

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You, O One whom eyes cannot see, and thoughts cannot perceive.
And whom describers cannot describe.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تُغَيِّرُهُ الدُّهُورُ وَلَا تُبْلِيهِ الْأَزْمِنَةُ وَلَا تَحْمِلُهُ الْأُمُورُ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa taghayyiruhu adduhooru wa laa tublihi alazminatu wa laa tahmiluhu alumooru

translation.en: O One whom time does not change, nor do ages wear out, nor is He burdened by matters.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَذُوقُ الْمَوْتَ وَلَا يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa yadhooq almawta wa laa yakhaafu alfawta

translation.en: O One who does not taste death and does not fear loss.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَضُرُّهُ الذُّنُوبُ وَلَا تَنْقُصُهُ الْمَغْفِرَةُ
segments.transliteration: Yaa man laa tadhurruhu adhdhunoobu wa laa tanqusu almaghfirah

translation.en: O One whom sins do not harm, nor does forgiveness diminish Him.
Send blessings upon Muhammad and his family.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي مَا لَا يَنْقُصُكَ وَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا لَا يَضُرُّكَ وَافْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: Wahab li ma laa yanqusuq wa ighfir li ma laa yadhurruq wa af'al bi ma anta ahluh

translation.en: Grant me what does not diminish You, forgive me for what does not harm You, and deal with me as You are worthy.

text.en: 10. Recite "Allaahumma A'afinaa"

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عَافِنَا مِنْ كُلِّ بَلَاءِ الدُّنْيَاوَاصْرِفْ عَنَّا شَرَّ الدُّنْيَا وَ شَرَّ الْآخِرَۃِوَارْزُقْنَا خَيْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَ خَيْرَ الْآخِرَۃِبِفَضْلِکَ وَ رَحْمَتِکَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a’afinaa min kulli balaa-id dunyaa was’-rif a’nnaa sharrad dunyaa wa sharral aakhirati war-zuqnaa khayrad dunyaa wa khayrul aakhirati bifaz”lika wa rah’matika yaa arh’amar raah’imeen

translation.en: Oh Allah save us from all tribulations of the world; and turn away from us the evil of the world and the evil of the hereafter; and give us the good of the world and the good of the hereafter; By Thy grace and by Thy mercy, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!"

text.en: 11. Recite :"Allhumma haza salati"

segments.arabic:
اَللّٰهُمَّ هٰذِهٖ صَلَاتِي صَلَّيْتُهَا لَا لِحَاجَةٍ مِنْكَ إِلَيْهَا
 وَ لَا رَغْبَةٍ مِنْكَ فِيْهَا إِلَّا تَعْظِيمًا وَ طَاعَةً وَ إِجَابَةً لَّكَ إِلىٰ مَا أَمَرْتَنِي

translation.en: Oh Allah, this is the prayer that I have offered to thee. In offering it I have no need from Thee and no personal wish from Thee except to bow down (before Thy majesty) and to obey Thee and to comply with what Thou hast commanded me.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِنْ كَانَ فِيْهَا خَلَلٌ أَوْ نَقْصٌ مِنْ رُكُوْعِهَا أَوْ سُجُوْدِهَا أَوْ قِيَامِهَا أَوْ قُعُوْدِهَا فَلَا تُؤَاخِذْنِي وَ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِالْقَبُوْلِ وَ الْغُفْرَانِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: “ Oh Allah, do not punish me if there has been any flaw or defect in my bowings, my prostrations or my standings or sittings, and bestow Thy grace on me by Thy acceptance and forgiveness by Thy mercy. Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!”

translation.en: 12.Then recite the following:"A'ooza be'izzatil-lahe"

segments.arabic: أَعُوْذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِقُدْرَةِ الله وَ أَعُوْذُ بِمَغْفِرَةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِرَحْمَةِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِسُلْطَانِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ هُوَ عَلىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌوَ
segments.transliteration: A'ooza be'izzatil-lahe wa a'oozo be-qoodaratil-lahe wa a'oozo be-magh-firatil-lahe wa a'oozo be-rahmatil-lahe, wa a'oozo be-sooltanil-lahil-lazi-hova ala koolle shai'in qadeer.

translation.en: "I seek refuge in the might of Allah, and I seek refuge in the power of Allah, and I seek refuge in the forgiveness of Allah, and I seek refuge in the mercy of Allah, I seek refuge in the dominion of Allah, He Who has power over all things

segments.arabic: أَعُوْذُ بِكَرَمِ اللهِ وَ أَعُوْذُ بِجَمْعِ اللهِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيْدٍ وَ شَيْطَانٍ مَرِيْدٍ وَ كُلِّ مُغْتَالٍ وَ سَارِقٍ وَ عَارِضٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa a'o-ozo be - karamil-lahe wa a'ooze be jamillahes min sharre koolle jabbarin aneedin wa shaitanin mareed , koolle mookh-talin wa sare-qin wa arezin

translation.en: and I seek refuge in the mercy of Allah from the evil of all strong tyrants and the rebellious Shaitan, and all persons who attack from ambush, thieves and all accidents;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ وَ الْهَامَّةِ وَ الْعَامَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharris saam-mate val-haam-mate val-aam mate,

translation.en: and from the poisonous animals, and noxious insects and reptiles and evil of the common people

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ صَغِيْرَةٍ وَ كَبِيْرَةٍ بِلَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre koolle daab-batin saghiratin av kabiratin be lailin wa naharin,

translation.en: and from the menace of the small and big beasts in the nigh or in the day;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فُسَّاقِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ وَ فُجَّارِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre foossaquil-arabe val-aajame wa foojjarehim,

translation.en: and from the evil of the transgressors of Arab and non-Arabs and their sinners,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ فَسَقَةِ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre fasaqatit jinne val-inse,

translation.en: and from the evil of the transgressors among Jinn and men

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ رَبِّي آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيْمٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa min sharre koolle daab-batin anta aakhizoon benasiyateha inna rabbi ala siratim moostaqeem

translation.en: and from the evil of all living creatures which Thou holds by their forelock. Surely straight is the path of my Lord".

text.en: 13.Then recite the following: Allhumma be haqqe Muhammad..

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلِّ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: "Oh Allah! By the truth of Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُؤْمِنَّا مَكْرَكَ وَ لَا تُنْسِنَا ذِكْرَكَ وَ لَا تَكْشِفْ عَنَّا سِتْرَكَ

translation.en: and save me from Thy plan; and make us not forgetful of Thy remembrance;and do not disclose our defects which Thou has concealed;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَحْرِمْنَا فَضْلَكَ وَ لَا تُحِلَّ عَلَيْنَا غَضَبَكَ وَ لَا تُبَاعِدْنَا مِنْ جِوَارِكَ وَ لَا تَنْقُصْنَا مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ

translation.en: and do not deprive us of Thy grace; and do not bring down Thy wrath on us; and do not send us away from Thy vicinity and do not diminish Thy mercy on us;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَنْزِعْ مِنَّا بَرَكَتَكَ وَ لَا تَمْنَعْنَا عَافِيَتَكَ وَ أَصْلِحْ لَنَا مَا أَعْطَيْتَنَا

translation.en: and do not deflect Thy blessing from us; and do not deprive us of Thy salvation and set aright what thou has given us;

segments.arabic: وَ زِدْنَا مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْمُبَارَكِ الطَّيِّبِ الْحَسَنِ الْجَمِيْلِ وَ لَا تُغَيِّرْ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَتِكَ وَ لَا تُؤْيِسْنَا مِنْ رَوْحِكَ وَ لَا تُهِنَّا بَعْدَ كَرَامَتِكَ

translation.en: and increase Thy blessed, excellent and fine bounty on us; and do not alter thy blessings which we possess and do not remove us away from Thy abundance for undoubtedly thou art most generous;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُضِلَّنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنا وَ هَبْ لَنا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ

translation.en: and do not let us go astray after thou hast guided us aright; and grant us from Thee mercy. Verily, Thou are Most generous.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ قُلُوْبَنَا سَالِمَةً وَ أَرْوَاحَنَا طَيِّبَةً وَ أَزْوَاجَنَا مُطَهَّرَةً وَ أَلْسِنَتَنَا صَادِقَةً وَ إِيْمَانَنَا دَائِماً وَ يَقِيْنَنَا صَادِقاً وَ تِجَارَتَنَا لَا تَبُورُ

translation.en: Oh Allah! make our hearts obedient to Thee and our souls good, and keep our wives chaste, and make our tongues truthful and our belief lasting and our certainty sincere and do not destroy our livelihood

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَ آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَ قِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ.

translation.en: our Lord! Grant us good in the world and good in the hereafter, and save us from the chastisement of the fire".

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ عَجِّلْ فَرَجَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ إِحْفَظْ غَيْبَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ ، يا رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ إِنْتَقِمْ لِابْنَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ عليهما السلام .

translation.en: O' Lord of Muhammad hasten the relief of the family of Muhammad, O' Lord of Muhammad protect the absence of Muhammad, O' Lord of Muhammad retaliate for the daughter of Muhammad (peace be on them).

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ . أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّ رَسُولَكَ الصَّادِقَ الْمُصَدَّقَ صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ قالَ إِنَّكَ قُلْتَ ما تَرَدَّدْتُ في شَيْءٍ أَنَا فاعِلُهُ كَتَرَدُّدي في قَبْضِ رُوحِ عَبْدِيَ الْمُؤْمِنِ، يَكْرَهُ الْمَوْتَ وَأَنَا أَكْرَهُ مَساءَتَهُ .

translation.en: O' Allah! Send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad, O' Allah! Verily Your Prophet, the faithful ones and the trust worthy ones report Your saying that You said: You did not hesitate in anything like You do when taking the life of a good believing servant, he dislike death while I dislike causing him harm.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ، وَعَجِّلْ لِوَلِيِّكَ الْفَرَجَ ، وَالنَّصْرَ وَالْعافِيَةَ ، وَلاتَسُؤْني في نَفْسي ، وَلا في فُلانٍ .

translation.en: O' Allah send Your blessing on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad and hasten Your guard's relief, grant him good health and victory, and don't cause evil to my soul, and don't cause me evil through So and so person.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا، وَأَجْرًا عَظِيمًا، وَتَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا، وَلِسَانًا ذَاكِرًا، وَبَدَنًا حَلِيمًا، وَرِزْقًا مَزِيدًا، وَعِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَعَمَلًا صَالِحًا، وَدُعَاءً مُسْتَجَابًا، وَذَنْبًا مَغْفُورًا، وَرِزْقًا صَادِقًا، وَذُرِّيَّةً صَالِحَةً، وَشِفَاءً شَافِيًا، وَمَصِيرًا مُبَارَكًا، وَنَصْرًا قَرِيبًا، وَنَعِيمًا دَائِمًا، وَالْجَنَّةَ، وَالْحَرِيرَ، وَالنَّضَارَةَ، وَالسُّرُورَ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka sabran jameelan, wa ajran azeeman, wa tawbatan nasoohan, wa lisanan dhakiran, wa badanan haleeman, wa rizqan mazeedan, wa 'ilman naafi'an, wa 'amalan salihan, wa du'aa'an mustajaaban, wa dhanban maghfooran, wa rizqan saadiqan, wa dhurriyyatan salihatan, wa shifaa'an shaafiyan, wa maseeran mubaarakan, wa nasran qareeban, wa na'eeman daaiman, wal-jannata, wal-hareera, wan-nadharata, was-surura, birahmatika yaa arhamar-raahimeen.

translation.en: "Oh Allah! I ask Thee for joyful patience, great reward; sincere turning; a remembering tongue; forbearing body; increased subsistence beneficial knowledge and good action; granted supplication; forgiven sin; honest livelihood; decent children; wholesome cure; a blessed destination; a victory close at hand; and lasting bliss and the Paradise, and silk, and freshness and vigour, and delight, by Thy mercy, Oh Most Merciful of the Merciful!"

text.en: ReciteSyeda Fatima Zehra (sa) Dua after isha Salat

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعَظَمَتِهٖ، سُبْحَانَ مَنْ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعِزَّتِهٖ، سُبْحَانَ مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِاَمْرِهٖ وَ مُلْكِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: subhaana man tawaa-za-a’ kullo shay-in le-a’zamatehi, subhaana man zalla kullo shay-in le-i’zzatehi, subhaana man khaza-a’ kullo shay-in le-amrehi wa mulkehi.

translation.en: Glorified is the one, before whose greatness, everything is subservient. Glorified is the one, before whose power, everything is debased.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنِ انْقَادَتْ لَهُ الْاُمُوْرُ بِاَزِمَّتِهَا.
segments.transliteration: subhaana manin qaadat lahul omooro be-azimmatehaa.

translation.en: Glorified is the one, before whose command and kingdom, everything is humble.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَنْسَى مَنْ ذَكَرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lā yansā man dhakarahu,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who never forgets the one who remembers Him,

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يُخَيِّبُ مَنْ دَعَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lā yukhayyibu man da‘āhu,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who never disappoints the one who calls upon Him,

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَيْهِ كَفَاهُ.
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī man tawakkala ‘alayhi kafāhu.

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, Who suffices whoever relies upon Him.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَامِكِ السَّمَاءِ، وَ سَاطِحِ الْأَرْضِ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi sāmiḳi as-samā’i, wa sāṭiḥi al-arḍi,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, the One Who raised the heavens and spread the earth,

segments.arabic: وَ حَاصِرِ الْبِحَارِ، وَ نَاضِدِ الْجِبَالِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ḥāṣiri al-biḥāri, wa nāḍidi al-jibāli,

translation.en: and Who confines the seas, and Who sets firm the mountains,

segments.arabic: وَ بَارِئِ الْحَيَوَانِ، وَ خَالِقِ الشَّجَرِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bāri’i al-ḥayawāni, wa khāliqi ash-shajari,

translation.en: and Who created living beings, and Who brought forth the trees,

segments.arabic: وَ فَاتِحِ يَنَابِيعِ الْأَرْضِ، وَ مُدَبِّرِ الْأُمُورِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa fātiḥi yanābī‘i al-arḍi, wa mudabbiri al-umūri,

translation.en: and Who opened the springs of the earth, and Who directs the affairs,

segments.arabic: وَ مُسَيِّرِ السَّحَابِ، وَ مُجْرِي الرِّيحِ وَ الْمَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa musayyiri as-saḥābi, wa mujri ar-rīḥi wa al-mā’i,

translation.en: and Who drives the clouds, and Who sets in motion the wind and the water,

segments.arabic: وَ النَّارِ مِنْ أَغْوَارِ الْأَرْضِ، مُتَسَارِعَاتٍ فِي الْهَوَاءِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa an-nāri min aghwāri al-arḍi, mutasāri‘ātin fī al-hawā’i,

translation.en: and the fire from the depths of the earth, swiftly moving in the air,
and Who sends down heat and cold.

segments.arabic: اَلَّذِيْ بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ، وَ بِشُكْرِهِ تُسْتَوْجَبُ الزِّيَادَاتُ،
segments.transliteration: Alladhī bina‘matihi tatimmu aṣ-ṣāliḥātu, wa bishukrihi tustawjabu az-ziyādātu,

translation.en: The One by Whose blessing good deeds are completed, and by Whose gratitude increases are deserved,

segments.arabic: وَبِأَمْرِهِ قَامَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ، وَبِعِزَّتِهِ اسْتَقَرَّتِ الرَّاسِيَاتُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa bi’amrihi qāmati as-samāwātu, wa bi‘izzatihi istaqarrati ar-rāsiyātu,

translation.en: and by His command the heavens were established, and by His might the firm mountains were set,

segments.arabic: وَسَبَّحَتِ الْوُحُوشُ فِي الْفَلَوَاتِ، وَالطَّيْرُ فِي الْوَكَنَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: Wa sabbaḥati al-wuḥūshu fī al-falawāti, waṭ-ṭayru fī al-wakanāti.

translation.en: and the wild beasts glorify Him in the open fields, and the birds in their nests.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَفِيعِ الدَّرَجَاتِ، مُنْزِلِ الْآيَاتِ، وَاسِعِ الْبَرَكَاتِ، سَاتِرِ الْعَوْرَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi rafī‘i ad-darajāti, munzili al-āyāti, wāsi‘i al-barakāti, sātiri al-‘awrāti,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, the Exalted in ranks, Revealer of signs, Expander of blessings, and Concealer of faults,

segments.arabic: قَابِلِ الْحَسَنَاتِ، مُقِيلِ الْعَثَرَاتِ، مُنَفِّسِ الْكُرُبَاتِ، مُنْزِلِ الْبَرَكَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: Qābili al-ḥasanāti, muqīli al-‘atharāti, munaffisi al-kurubāti, munzili al-barakāti,

translation.en: Accepter of good deeds, Forgiver of stumbles, Reliever of distresses, and Sender of blessings,

segments.arabic: مُجِيبِ الدَّعَوَاتِ، مُحْيِي الْأَمْوَاتِ، إِلٰهِ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَ السَّمَاوَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: Mujībi ad-da‘awāti, muḥyī al-amwāti, ilāha man fī al-arḍi wa as-samāwāti.

translation.en: Answerer of prayers, Reviver of the dead, God of all in the earth and the heavens.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَمْدٍ وَ ذِكْرٍ، وَ شُكْرٍ وَ صَبْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi ‘alā kulli ḥamdin wa dhikrin, wa shukrin wa ṣabrin,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah for every praise and remembrance, and for gratitude and patience,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَاةٍ وَ زَكَاةٍ، وَ قِيَامٍ وَ عِبَادَةٍ، وَ سَعَادَةٍ وَ بَرَكَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣalātin wa zakātin, wa qiyāmin wa ‘ibādah, wa sa‘ādah wa barakah,

translation.en: and for prayer and almsgiving, for standing in worship and servitude, for happiness and blessing,

segments.arabic: وَ زِيَادَةٍ وَ رَحْمَةٍ، وَ نِعْمَةٍ وَ كَرَامَةٍ، وَ فَرِيضَةٍ وَ سَرَّاءَ وَ ضَرَّاءَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ziyādah wa raḥmah, wa ni‘mah wa karāmah, wa farīḍah wa sarā’a wa ḍarrā’a,

translation.en: and for increase and mercy, for bounty and honor, for obligations, for ease and hardship,

segments.arabic: وَ شِدَّةٍ وَ رَخَاءٍ، وَ مُصِيبَةٍ وَ بَلَاءٍ، وَ عُسْرٍ وَ يُسْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa shiddah wa rakhā’, wa muṣībah wa balā’, wa ‘usrin wa yusrin,

translation.en: and for severity and relief, for trials and afflictions, for difficulty and ease,

segments.arabic: وَ غِنَاءٍ وَ فَقْرٍ، وَ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ، وَ فِي كُلِّ أَوَانٍ وَ زَمَانٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ghinā’in wa faqr, wa ‘alā kulli ḥālin, wa fī kulli awānin wa zamānin,

translation.en: and for wealth and poverty, in every state, and in every time and age,

segments.arabic: وَ فِي كُلِّ مَثْوًى وَ مُنْقَلَبٍ وَ مُقَامٍ.
segments.transliteration: Wa fī kulli mathwan wa munqalabin wa maqāmin.

translation.en: and in every dwelling, return, and station.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَائِذٌ بِكَ، وَ لَائِذٌ بِحِمَاكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī ‘ā’idun bika, wa lā’iḏun bi-ḥimāk,

translation.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You, and I cling to Your protection,
seeking safety within Your fortress, exposing myself to Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ مُسْتَسْلِمٌ لِقَضَائِكَ، وَ رَاضٍ بِحُكْمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa mustaslimun li-qaḍā’ik, wa rāḍin bi-ḥukmik,

translation.en: surrendering to Your decree, and content with Your judgment,

segments.arabic: مُوَكِّلٌ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، أَفْوَضُ أَمْرِي إِلَى اللهِ،
segments.transliteration: Muwakkilun amrī ilayk, ufawwiḍu amrī ilā-llāh,

translation.en: entrusting my affair to You, I consign my matter to Allah,
Indeed, Allah sees His servants.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يُرْجَى إِلَّا فَضْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lā yurjā illā faḍluhu,

translation.en: All praise belongs to Allah, the One from whom only bounty is hoped,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يُسْأَلُ إِلَّا عَفْوُهُ، وَلَا يُنْظَرُ إِلَّا بِرُّهُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa lā yus’alu illā ‘afwuhu, wa lā yunẓaru illā birruhu,

translation.en: and none is asked except for His pardon, and none is looked to except His kindness,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يُخَافُ إِلَّا عَدْلُهُ، وَلَا يُدْرَكُ إِلَّا عِلْمُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa lā yukhāfu illā ‘adluhu, wa lā yudraku illā ‘ilmuhu,

translation.en: and none is feared except His justice, and none comprehends except His knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يُحَاطُ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَانِهِ، وَلَا يَبْقَى إِلَّا مُلْكُهُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa lā yuḥāṭu illā bisulṭānihi, wa lā yabqā illā mulkuhu,

translation.en: and none encompasses except by His authority, and nothing endures except His dominion,

segments.arabic: وَلَا يُعْبَدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa lā yu‘badu illā iyyāh, wa lā ilāha illā huwa.

translation.en: and none is worshipped except Him; there is no god but He.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي أَخْشَاكَ كَأَنِّي أَرَاكَ أَبَدًا حَتَّى أَلْقَاكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ij‘alnī akhshāk, ka’annī arāk abadan ḥattā alqāk,

translation.en: O Allah, make me fear You as though I see You always, until I meet You,

segments.transliteration: Wa as‘idnī bi-taqwāk, wa lā tushqīnī bi-ma‘siyatika,

translation.en: And make me joyful through Your piety, and do not let me be afflicted by disobedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَخِرْ لِي فِي قَضَائِكَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِي قَدَرِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa khir lī fī qaḍā’ika, wa bārik lī fī qadarika,

translation.en: Make whatever happens by Your decree good for me, and bless me in what You have destined,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لَا أُحِبَّ تَعْجِيلَ مَا أَخَّرْتَ وَلَا تَأْخِيرَ مَا عَجَّلْتَ،
segments.transliteration: Ḥattā lā uḥibba ta‘jīla mā akhkharta wa lā ta’khīra mā ‘ajjalt,

translation.en: Until I dislike hastening what You have delayed, and delaying what You hastened,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ غِنَايَ فِي نَفْسِي، وَأَمْتِعْنِي بِسَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي، وَاجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَرِثَينِ مِنِّي،
segments.transliteration: Wa ij‘al ghināya fī nafsī, wa amti‘nī bi-sam‘ī wa baṣarī, wa ij‘lahumā al-warithayni minnī,

translation.en: And make richness in my self; grant me the enjoyment of my hearing and my sight; and let them be my inheritors,

segments.arabic: وَانْصُرْنِي عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنِي، وَأَرِنِي فِيهِ ثَأْرِي، وَأَقِرَّ بِذَلِكَ عَيْنِي .
segments.transliteration: Wa anṣurnī ‘alā man ẓalamani, wa arinī fīhi tha’irī, wa aqirru bidhālika ‘aynī.

translation.en: And support me against those who wronged me; show me my vindication; and confirm that in my eyes.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي حَسَدَ الْحَاسِدِينَ، وَبَغْيَ الْبَاغِينَ، وَكَيْدَ الْكَائِدِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ikfinī ḥasada al-ḥāsidīn, wa baghya al-bāghīn, wa kayda al-kā’idīn,

translation.en: O Allah, protect me from the envy of the envious, the oppression of the oppressors, and the plots of the schemers,

segments.arabic: وَمَكْرَ الْمَاكِرِينَ، وَحِيلَةَ الْمُحْتَالِينَ، وَغِيلَةَ الْمُغْتَالِينَ، وَظُلْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa makra al-mākirīn, wa ḥīlata al-muḥtālīn, wa ghīlata al-mughtālīn, wa ẓulma aẓ-ẓālimīn,

translation.en: and the deception of the crafty, the schemes of the fraudulent, the ambush of the assassins, and the injustice of the oppressors,

segments.arabic: وَجَوْرَ الْجَائِرِينَ، وَاعْتِدَاءَ الْمُعْتَدِينَ، وَسَخَطَ الْمُسْخِطِينَ، وَتَشَحُّبَ الْمُتَشَحِّبِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa jawra al-jā’irīn, wa i‘tida’a al-mu‘tadīn, wa sakhaṭa al-muskhiṭīn, wa tashaḥḥuba al-mutashaḥḥibīn,

translation.en: and the tyranny of the transgressors, the aggression of the aggressors, the anger of the enragers, and the malice of the malicious,

segments.arabic: وَصَوْلَةَ الصَّائِلِينَ، وَاقْتِسَارَ الْمُقْتَسِرِينَ، وَغَشْمَ الْغَاشِمِينَ، وَخَبْطَ الْخَابِطِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣawlat aṣ-ṣā’ilīn, wa iqtisār al-muqtisirīn, wa ghashma al-ghāshimīn, wa khabṭ al-khābiṭīn,

translation.en: and the attacks of the assailants, the stinginess of the miserly, the oppression of the violent, and the blows of the aggressors,

segments.arabic: وَسِعَايَةَ السَّاعِينَ، وَنَمَامَةَ النَّمَّامِينَ، وَسِحْرَ السَّحَرَةِ وَالْمَرَدَّةِ وَالشَّيَاطِينِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa siyāyata as-sā‘īn, wa namāmat an-nammāmīn, wa siḥra as-saḥarah wa al-muraddah wa ash-shayāṭīn,

translation.en: and the deeds of the schemers, the gossip of the slanderers, and the magic of the sorcerers, the rebellious, and the devils,

segments.transliteration: Wa jawra as-salātīn, wa makrū al-‘ālamīn.

translation.en: and the injustice of rulers and the deceit of the people of the world.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْمَخْزُونِ الطَّيِّبِ الطَّاهِرِ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as’aluka bi-ismika al-makhzūni aṭ-ṭayyibi aṭ-ṭāhir,

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your stored, pure, and holy Name,

segments.arabic: الَّذِي قَامَتْ بِهِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ، وَأشْرَقَتْ لَهُ الظُّلُمُ،
segments.transliteration: Alladhī qāmat bihi as-samāwātu wa al-arḍ, wa ashrāqat lahu aẓ-ẓulum,

translation.en: by which the heavens and the earth were established, and darkness shone for it,

segments.arabic: وَسَبَّحَتْ لَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَوَجِلَتْ مِنْهُ الْقُلُوبُ، وَخَضَعَتْ لَهُ الرِّقَابُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa sabbaḥat lahu al-malā’ikah, wa wajilat minhu al-qulūb, wa khaḍa‘at lahu ar-riqāb,

translation.en: and the angels glorified Him, hearts trembled from Him, and necks humbled before Him,

segments.arabic: وَأُحْيِيَتْ بِهِ الْمَوْتَى، أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ فِي ظُلُمِ اللَّيْلِ وَضَوْءِ النَّهَارِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa uḥyiyat bihi al-mawtā, an taghfir lī kull dhamb adh-nabtuhu fī ẓulumi al-layl wa ḍaw’i an-nahār,

translation.en: and the dead were brought to life by it: that You forgive me every sin I committed in the darkness of night and light of day,

segments.arabic: عَمْدًا أَوْ خَطَأً، سِرًّا أَوْ عَلَانِيَةً، وَأَنْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِينًا وَهُدًى،
segments.transliteration: ‘Amdan aw khaṭa’an, sirran aw ‘alāniyah, wa an tahba lī yaqīnan wa hudan,

translation.en: whether intentionally or by mistake, secretly or openly, and that You grant me certainty and guidance,

segments.arabic: وَنُورًا وَعِلْمًا وَفَهْمًا، حَتَّى أُقِيمَ كِتَابَكَ، وَأُحِلَّ حَلَالَكَ، وَأُحَرِّمَ حَرَامَكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa nūran wa ‘ilman wa fahman, ḥattā uqīma kitābaka, wa uḥilla ḥalāluka, wa uḥarrima ḥarāmuka,

translation.en: and light, knowledge, and understanding, until I uphold Your Book, make lawful Your lawful, and forbid Your forbidden,

segments.arabic: وَأُؤَدِّيَ فَرَائِضَكَ، وَأُقِيمَ سُنَّةَ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ.
segments.transliteration: Wa u’addī farā’iḍaka, wa uqīma sunnata nabiyyika Muḥammad ﷺ.

translation.en: and perform Your obligations and establish the Sunnah of Your Prophet Muḥammad ﷺ.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ الْحِقْنِي بِصَالِحِ مَنْ مَضَى، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَالِحِ مَنْ بَقِيَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma al-ḥiqnī bi-ṣāliḥi man maḍā, wa aj‘alnī min ṣāliḥi man baqī,

translation.en: O Allah, join me with the righteous of those who have passed, and make me among the righteous of those who remain,

segments.arabic: وَاخْتِمْ لِي عَمَلِي بِأَحْسَنِهِ، إِنَّكَ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ikhtim lī ‘amalī bi-aḥsanihi, innaka ghafūrun raḥīm.

translation.en: and seal my deeds with the best of them; indeed, You are Forgiving, Merciful,

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِذَا فَنَى عُمْرِي وَتَصَرَّمَتْ أَيَّامُ حَيَاتِي، وَكَانَ لَا بُدَّ لِي مِنْ لِقَائِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma idhā fanā ‘umrī wa taṣarramat ayyāmu ḥayātī, wa kāna lā budda lī min liqā’ika,

translation.en: O Allah, if my life ends and the days of my existence are over, and I must meet You,

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ – يَا لَطِيفُ – أَنْ تُوْجِبَ لِي مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ مَنْزِلًا،
segments.transliteration: Fa as’aluka – yā Laṭīf – an tujib lī mina al-jannah manzilan,

translation.en: then I ask You – O Gentle One – to grant me a place in Paradise,
which will make the earliest and the latest of creation rejoice for me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اقْبَلْ مِدْحَتِي وَالْتِهَافِي، وَارْحَمْ ضَرَاعَتِي وَهُتَافِي،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma iqbal miḍḥatī wa al-tihāfī, wa arḥam ḍarā‘atī wa hutāfī,

translation.en: O Allah, accept my praise and my supplications, and have mercy on my humility and my cries,

segments.arabic: وَاقْرَارِي عَلَى نَفْسِي وَاعْتِرَافِي، فَقَدْ أَسْمَعْتُكَ صَوْتِي فِي الدَّاعِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa iq'rārī ‘alā nafsī wa i‘tirāfī, faqad asma‘tuka ṣawtī fī ad-dā‘īn,

translation.en: and my acknowledgment of myself, for I have made You hear my voice among the supplicants,

segments.arabic: وَخُشُوعِي فِي الضَّارِعِينَ، وَمِدْحَتِي فِي الْقَائِلِينَ، وَتَسْبِيحِي فِي الْمَادِحِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa khushū‘ī fī aḍ-ḍāri‘īn, wa miḍḥatī fī al-qā’ilīn, wa tasbīḥī fī al-mādiḥīn,

translation.en: and my humility among the prostrators, my praise among those who speak, and my glorification among the eulogists,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ مُجِيبُ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ، وَمُغِيْثُ الْمُسْتَغِيْثِينَ، وَغِيَاثُ الْمَلْهُوفِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa anta mujīb al-muḍṭarriyyin, wa mughīthu al-mustaghīthīn, wa ghiyāthu al-malhūfīn,

translation.en: and You are the Responder to the distressed, the Helper of those who seek help, and the Succor of the anxious,

segments.arabic: وَحِرْزُ الْهَارِبِينَ، وَصَرِيخُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ، وَمُقِيلُ الْمُذْنِبِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ḥirzu al-hāribīn, wa ṣarīkhu al-mu’minīn, wa muqīlu al-mudhnibīn.

translation.en: the Protector of those who flee, the Cry of the believers, and the Protector of the sinners,

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى الْبَشِيرِ النَّذِيرِ وَالسِّرَاجِ الْمُنِيرِ، وَعَلَى الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالنَّبِيِّينَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣallā allāhu ‘alā al-bashīri an-nadhīr wa as-sirāj al-munīr, wa ‘alā al-malā’ikah wa an-nabiyyīn.

translation.en: and may Allah send blessings upon the Bearer of Good News and Warner, the Illuminating Lamp, and upon the angels and the prophets.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ دَاحِيَ الْمَدْحُوَّاتِ، وَبَارِءَ الْمَسْمُوكَاتِ، وَجَبَّالَ الْقُلُوبِ عَلَى فِطْرَتِهَا، شَقِيِّهَا وَسَعِيدِهَا.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma dāḥī al-madḥawwāt, wa bāri’a al-masmūkāt, wa jabbāla al-qulūb ‘alā fiṭratihā, shaqīyihā wa sa‘īdihā.

translation.en: O Allah, Knower of all praises, Creator of all named beings, and Molder of hearts according to their innate nature, both the miserable and the happy,

segments.arabic: اِجْعَلْ شَرَائِفَ صَلَوَاتِكَ، وَنَوَامِيَ بَرَكَاتِكَ وَكَرَائِمَ تَحِيَّاتِكَ، عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ وَأَمِينِكَ عَلَى وَحْيِكَ.
segments.transliteration: Ij‘al sharā’ifa ṣalawātik, wa nawāmī barakātik wa karā’ima taḥiyyātik, ‘alā Muḥammad ‘abdik wa rasūlik wa amīnik ‘alā waḥyik.

translation.en: Place the nobility of Your prayers, the heights of Your blessings, and the best of Your greetings upon Muhammad, Your servant, messenger, and trustworthy guardian of Your revelation,

segments.arabic: الْقَائِمِ بِحُجَّتِكَ، وَالذَّابِّ عَنْ حَرَمِكَ، وَالصَّادِعِ بِأَمْرِكَ، وَالْمُشَيِّدِ لِآيَاتِكَ وَالْمُوْفِي لِنَذْرِكَ.
segments.transliteration: Al-qā’im bi-ḥujjatik, wa adh-dhābb ‘an ḥaramik, wa aṣ-ṣādi‘ bi-amrik, wa al-mushayyid li-āyātik wa al-muwaffī li-nadhrik.

translation.en: The one who stands by Your proof, defends Your sanctuary, enforces Your command, erects Your signs, and fulfills his vows to You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَأَعْطِهِ بِكُلِّ فَضِيلَةٍ مِنْ فَضَائِلِهِ، وَمَنْقَبَةٍ مِنْ مَنَاقِبِهِ، وَحَالٍ مِنْ أَحْوَالِهِ، وَمَنْزِلَةٍ مِنْ مَنَازِلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma fa-a‘ṭihi bi-kulli faḍīlah min faḍā’ilih, wa manqabah min manāqibih, wa ḥāl min aḥwālih, wa manzilah min manāzilih.

translation.en: O Allah, grant him every virtue of Your virtues, every merit of Your merits, a state from Your states, and a rank from Your ranks,

segments.arabic: رَأَيْتَ مُحَمَّدًا لَكَ فِيهَا نَاصِرًا، وَعَلَى مَكْرُوهِ بَلَائِكَ صَابِرًا، وَلِمَنْ عَادَاكَ مُعَادِيًا، وَلِمَنْ وَالَاكَ مُوَالِيًا، وَعَمَّا كَرِهْتَ نَائِيًا، وَإِلَى مَا أَحْبَبْتَ دَاعِيًا.
segments.transliteration: Ra’ayta Muḥammadan laka fīhā nāṣiran, wa ‘alā makrūhi balā’ik ṣābiran, wa liman ‘ādāk mu‘ādyan, wa liman wālāk muwāliyā, wa ‘ammā karihta nā’iyan, wa ilā mā aḥbabta dā‘iyan.

translation.en: You have seen Muhammad supporting You therein, patient against what displeased You, opposing whoever opposed You, allied with whoever befriended You, distant from what You disliked, and calling towards what You loved.

segments.arabic: فَضَائِلَ مِنْ جَزَائِكَ وَخَصَائِصَ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ وَحِبَائِكَ، تُسْنِي بِهَا أَمْرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: Faḍā’il min jazā’ika wa khaṣā’iṣ min ‘aṭā’ika wa ḥibā’ika, tusnī bihā amrahu,

translation.en: Virtues from Your recompense, and special favors from Your gifts and bounty, by which You perfect his affairs,

segments.arabic: وَتُعْلِي بِهَا دَرَجَتَهُ مَعَ الْقُوَّامِ بِقِسْطِكَ، وَالذَّابِّينَ عَنْ حَرَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa tu‘lī bihā darajatahu ma‘a al-quwwām bi-qistika, wa adh-dhābbīn ‘an ḥaramik,

translation.en: and elevate his rank among the upright by Your justice, and those defending Your sanctuary,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لَا يَبْقَى سَنَاءٌ وَلَا بَهَاءٌ وَلَا رَحْمَةٌ وَلَا كَرَامَةٌ إِلَّا خَصَّصْتَ مُحَمَّدًا بِذَلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: Ḥattā lā yabqā sanā’ wa lā bahā’ wa lā raḥmah wa lā karāmah illā khaṣṣasta Muḥammadan bidhālika,

translation.en: until no splendor, glory, mercy, or honor remains except that You have made it specific to Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَتَيْتَهُ مِنْكَ الذُّرَى وَبَلَّغْتَهُ الْمَقَامَاتِ الْعُلَى، آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: Wa ataytahu minka adh-dhurā wa ballaghtahu al-maqāmāt al-‘ulā, āmīn, rabba al-‘ālamīn.

translation.en: and granted him from You the highest ranks, and elevated him to the loftiest stations. Amen, Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَوْدِعُكَ دِينِي وَنَفْسِي وَجَمِيعَ نِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma innī astawdi‘uka dīnī wa nafsī wa jamī‘a ni‘matika ‘alayya,

translation.en: O Allah, I entrust to You my religion, my soul, and all Your blessings upon me,

segments.arabic: فَاجْعَلْنِي فِي كَنَفِكَ وَحِفْظِكَ، وَعِزِّكَ وَمَنْعِكَ.
segments.transliteration: Fa-aj‘alnī fī kanafika wa ḥifẓik, wa ‘izzik wa man‘ik.

translation.en: so place me under Your protection, preservation, honor, and safeguard,

segments.arabic: عَزَّ جَارُكَ، وَجَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَتَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُكَ،
segments.transliteration: ‘Azza jāruk, wa jalla thanā’uk, wa taqaddasat asmā’uk,

translation.en: Exalted is Your Neighbor, glorious is Your Praise, and sanctified are Your Names,

segments.arabic: وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ حَسْبِي أَنْتَ فِي السَّرَّاءِ وَالضَّرَّاءِ وَالشِّدَّةِ وَالرَّخَاءِ، وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ.
segments.transliteration: Wa lā ilāha ghayruka ḥasbī anta fī as-sarrā’ wa ḍ-ḍarrā’ wa ash-shiddah wa ar-rakhā’, wa ni‘mal wakīl.

translation.en: There is no deity besides You; You suffice for me in ease and hardship, in adversity and prosperity. Excellent is the Trustee.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ۝۴
segments.transliteration: Rabbana ‘alayka tawakkalnā wa ilayka anabnā wa ilayka al-maṣīr.

translation.en: Our Lord, upon You we rely, to You we return, and to You is our destination.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَا۝۰ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ۝۵
segments.transliteration: Rabbana lā taj‘alnā fitnah lil-ladhīna kafarū wa ighfir lanā rabbana, innaka anta al-‘azīz al-ḥakīm.

translation.en: Our Lord, do not make us a trial for the disbelievers, and forgive us; indeed, You are the Mighty, the Wise.
Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell,

segments.arabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا۝۶۵ۤۖ إِنَّهَا سَاۗءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا۝۶۶
segments.transliteration: Inna ‘adhābahā kāna gharāman, innahā sā’at mustaqqarran wa muqāmā.

translation.en: Indeed, its punishment is severe; truly it is a terrible abode and dwelling.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا افْتَحْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ قَوْمِنَا بِالْحَقِّ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْفَاتِحِينَ۝۸۹
segments.transliteration: Rabbana iftaḥ baynanā wa bayna qawmnā bil-ḥaqq, wa anta khayru al-fātiḥīn.

translation.en: Our Lord, establish justice between us and our people; You are the best of those who give victory.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ۝۱۹۳
segments.transliteration: Rabbana faghfir lanā dhunūbanā wa kaffir ‘annā sayyi’ātinā wa tawaffanā ma‘a al-abrār.

translation.en: Our Lord, forgive our sins, remove our misdeeds, and let us die among the righteous.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلَى رُسُلِكَ وَلَا تُخْزِنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ۝۰ۭ إِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ۝۱۹۴
segments.transliteration: Rabbana wa ātinā mā wa‘adtanā ‘alā rusulika wa lā tukhzinā yawma al-qiyāmah, innaka lā tukhlifu al-mī‘ād.

translation.en: Our Lord, grant us what You promised us through Your messengers and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection; indeed, You never break Your promise.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا۝۰ۚ
segments.transliteration: Rabbana lā tu’ākhidhnā in nasīnā aw akhṭa’nā.

translation.en: Our Lord, do not hold us accountable if we forget or make a mistake,

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا۝۰ۚ
segments.transliteration: Rabbana wa lā taḥmil ‘alaynā iṣran kamā ḥamaltahu ‘alā alladhīna min qablina.

translation.en: Our Lord, do not burden us with a responsibility as You burdened those before us,

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ۝۰ۚ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا۝۰۪ وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا۝۰۪ وَارْحَمْنَا۝۰۪ أَنْتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ۝۲۸۶ۧ
segments.transliteration: Rabbana wa lā tuḥammilnā mā lā ṭāqah lanā bih, wa‘fu ‘annā, wa-ghfir lanā, wa-rḥamnā, anta mawlānā fanṣurnā ‘alā al-qawmil-kāfirīn.

translation.en: Our Lord, do not impose upon us that which we cannot bear, forgive us, pardon us, have mercy on us; You are our Protector, so grant us victory over the disbelieving people.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ۝۲۰۱
segments.transliteration: Rabbana ātinā fī ad-dunyā ḥasanatan wa fī al-ākhirah ḥasanatan wa qinā ‘adhāb an-nār.

translation.en: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيمًا.
segments.transliteration: Wa ṣallā Allāhu ‘alā sayyidinā Muḥammad an-nabiyy wa ālihi aṭ-ṭāhirīn wa sallama taslīman.

translation.en: And may Allah send blessings upon our Master Muhammad, the Prophet, and his pure family, and grant them peace completely.

text.en: Common Taqeebat
text.ar: ادعية تعقیبات مشهورة

text.en: Recited after the obligatory salat
text.ar: يتلى بعد صلاة الفريضة

text.en: The following prayers and recommended devotional acts have been quoted from Shaykh al-Tusi’s famous book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid and other reference books.
text.ar: فإذا سَلّمت وفرغت من الصلاة فَقُل : الله أَكبرُ ثلاث مَرّات رافعاً عند كلّ تكبيرة يديك إلى حيال أُذنيك ثُمَّ قل :

text.en: After you say the Taslim statement - the closing part of the ritual prayers - and accomplish your prayer, repeat the Takbir statement (i.e. Allahuakbar; Allah is the Greatest) three times while raising your hands to the level of your ears and then say:

translation.en: There is no god save Allah;
One and Only God;
and we are submissive to Him.
There is no god save Allah
and we worship none save Him,
making our devotion sincere as in His sight,
even though the polytheists may detest it.
There is no god save Allah;
(He is) Our Lord and the Lord of our fathers of old.
There is no god save Allah;
Alone, alone, alone.
He has truly fulfilled His promise,
granted His servant victory,
made powerful His soldiers,
and defeated the parties alone.
So, sovereignty be His and praise be His.
He grants life and causes (others) to die,
and (then) causes to die and raises from the dead;
while He is eternally ever-living and He never dies.
All goodness is at His Hand,
and He has power over all things.

text.en: Then, say the following:
text.ar: ثُمَّ قُل :

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah; there is no god save Him,
the Ever-living and Self-Subsisting; and to Him do I turn in repentance.

text.en: Then, say the following:
text.ar: ثُمَّ قُل :

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) guide me to the true guidance of Yours,
pour upon me from Your grace,
spread over me from Your mercy,
and bring down upon me from Your blessings.
Glory be to You; there is no god save You.
(Please) forgive my sins—all of them entirely,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ كُلَّهَا جَمِيعاً إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba kulliha jami`an illa anta

translation.en: because none can forgive all sins entirely save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min kulli khayrin ahata bihi `ilmuka

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me part of all good things that are encompassed by Your knowledge

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَرٍّ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min kulli sharrin ahata bihi `ilmuka

translation.en: and I seek Your protection against all evils that are encompassed by Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عَافِيَتَكَ في أُمُوري كُلِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka `afiyataka fi umuri kulliha

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me wellbeing from You in all of my affairs

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ ٱلآخَرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min khizyi alddunya wa `adhabi alakhirati

translation.en: and I seek Your protection against the disgrace of this world and the chastisement in the Next World.
I also seek protection of Your Noble Face,
Your invulnerable omnipotence,

segments.arabic: وَقُدْرَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَمْتَنِعُ مِنْهَا شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qudratika allati la yamtani`u minha shay'un

translation.en: and Your power that none can deter
against the evils of this world and the Next World,
the evils of all pains,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and the evil of all moving creatures that You grasp from forelocks.
Verily, my Lord is on a Straight Path.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is neither strength nor power save with Allah, the All-high and All-great.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ

translation.en: I put my trust in the Ever-living (Lord) Who never dies.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَداً
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi alladhi lam yattakhidh waladan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has not taken to Himself a son,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَريكٌ فِي ٱلْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fi almulki

translation.en: nor has He had any partner in sovereignty,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu waliyyun mina aldhdhulli

translation.en: nor does He need any to protect Him from humiliation.
And magnify Him with all magnificence.

text.en: Then, utter the Tasbih al-Zahra’ litany (which is discussed in the attached book of al-Baqiyat al-Salihat).
text.ar: ثُمَّ سبِّحْ تسبيح الزهراء عليها‌السلام وقُل عشر مَرات قَبلَ أَن تتحرك مِنْ موضعك :

text.en: Before you move from your prayer-place, repeat the following litany ten times:

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah;
(He is) One and Only; and there is no partner with Him;
a Single God;
One, Unique, and eternally Besought of all.

segments.transliteration: lam yattakhidh sahibatan wa la waladan

translation.en: He has taken to Himself neither a wife nor a son.

text.en: It is narrated that a great reward is obtained by saying this litany, especially after the Dawn (Fajr) and Evening (Isha’) obligatory Prayers and at sunrise and sunset.
text.ar: أقول : روي لهذا التهليل فضل كبير سيَّما إِذا عقب بعده صلاة الصبح والعشاء وإِذا قري عند طلوع الشَمس وغروبها.

text.en: Then, say the following:
text.ar: ثُمَّ تقول :

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ كُلَّما سَبَّحَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi kullama sabbaha allaha shay'un

translation.en: All Glory be to Allah whenever Allah is glorified by things,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yusabbaha

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes to be glorified,
as exactly as He is worthy of glorification,

segments.arabic: وَكمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa `izzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كُلَّمَا حَمِدَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi kullama hamida allaha shay'un

translation.en: All praise be to Allah whenever Allah is praised by things,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yuhmada

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes to be praised,
as exactly as He is worthy of praising,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa `izzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ كُلَّمَا هَلَّلَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu kullama hallala allaha shay'un

translation.en: There is no god save Allah whenever Allah’s Oneness in Godhead is professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yuhallala

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes His Oneness in Godhead to be professed,
as exactly as He is worthy of being the One and Only God,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa `izzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كُلَّمَا كَبَّرَ ٱللَّهَ شَيءٌ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru kullama kabbara allaha shay'un

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest whenever Allah’s Most Greatness is professed,

segments.transliteration: wa kama yuhibbu allahu an yukabbara

translation.en: as exactly as Allah likes His Most Greatness to be professed,
as exactly as He is worthy of being the Greatest,

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ وَعِزِّ جَلاَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi wa `izzi jalalihi

translation.en: and as it is suitable for the nobility of His Face and the might of His Majesty.
All glory be to Allah;
all praise be to Allah;
there is no god save Allah;
and Allah is the Greatest

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نِعْمَة أَنْعَمَ بِهَا عَلَيَّ

translation.en: for all bounties that He has bestowed upon me
and upon each and every being of His creatures,

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ كَانَ أَوْ يَكُونُ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: mimman kana aw yakunu ila yawmi alqiyamati

translation.en: including those who passed away and those who will exist up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا أَرْجُو
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka min khayri ma arju

translation.en: and I beseech You to grant me the best of what I hope
and the best of what I have not included with my hopes.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَحْذَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min sharri ma ahdharu

translation.en: I also beseech You to protect me against the evil of what I anticipate

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma la ahdharu

translation.en: and the evils of what I do not anticipate.

text.en: Then, recite the following Quranic texts:
text.ar: ثُمَّ تقرأ سورة الحَمد ، و <ref=1:2:255-257>آیة الکرسي</ref>  ، وآية :  <ref=1:3:18-19>شَهِدَ الله</ref> و آية <ref=1:3:26-26>قُلِ اللّهُمَّ مالِكَ المُلْكِ</ref> و <ref=1:7:54-56>آيات ثلاث مِنْ سورة الاَعْراف</ref>

text.en:
(1) Surah al-Hamd , (2) <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref>
, (3) <ref=1:3:18-19>Ayat al-Shahadah</ref> , (4) <ref=1:3:26-26>Ayah al-Mulk</ref> 
, and (5) <ref=1:7:54-56>Ayah al-Sakharah</ref> .
text.ar: ثُمَّ تقول ثلاثاً :

text.en: Then, repeat the following verses (Surah al-Saaffaat 37:180-183) three times:

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

translation.en: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
And peace be on the messengers.
And all praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

text.en: Then, repeat the following supplicatory prayer three times:
text.ar: ثُمَّ تقول ثلاث مَرات :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: waj`al li min amri farajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: cause all my affairs to arrive at a relief, prepare for me a way out,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ أَحْتَسِبُ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu

translation.en: and give me sustenance from whence I think and from whence I do not think.

text.en: This supplicatory prayer was taught by Archangel Gabriel to Prophet Yusuf (Joseph) - peace be upon him - when he was in prison.
text.ar: وهذا دعاء عَلَّمَهُ جبرائيل يوسف عليه‌السلام في السجن

text.en: Then, hold your beard with your right hand, raise your left hand towards the sky, and repeat the following supplicatory prayer seven times:
text.ar: ثُمَّ خذْ لحيتك بيدكَ اليمنى وابسط يدكَ اليسرى إلى السماء وقُل سبع مَرات :

translation.en: O Lord of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad:
(Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and hasten the Relief of the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: Keeping on the same situation, repeat the following supplicatory prayer three times:
text.ar: وقُل ثلاثاً وأَنتَ على ذلكَ الحال :

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Honor,
(Please) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
have mercy upon me, and deliver me from Hellfire.

text.en: After repeating Surah al-Ikhlaas (or al-Tawheed; No. 112) twelve times, say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: ثُمَّ تقرأ اثنتي عشرة مرّة سورة (قُل هوَ الله أحد). وَتَقول :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ ٱلْمَخْزُونِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bismika almaknuni almakhzuni

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in Your Name: the well-guarded, stored,
pure, immaculate, and blessed.
And I beseech You in Your Great Name
and Your eternal power.
O Donor of gifts!
O Releaser of captives!

segments.transliteration: wa ya fakkaka alrriqabi mina alnnari

translation.en: O Deliverer of necks from the Fire!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُعْتِقَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa an tu`tiqa raqabati mina alnnari

translation.en: to deliver me from the Fire,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَنِي مِنَ ٱلدُّنْيَا سَالِماً
segments.transliteration: wa an tukhrijani mina alddunya saliman

translation.en: to cause me leave this world free (from liabilities),
to allow me to Paradise with security,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ دُعَائِي أَوَّلَهُ فَلاَحاً
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala du`a'i awwalahu falahan

translation.en: and to make the beginning of my prayer successful,
the middle of it a gain,
and the end of it a prosperity.
Verily, You are the Knower of all unseen things.

text.en: According to al-Sahifah al-Alawiyyah (a collection of Imam Ali’s supplications), the following supplicatory prayer is advisably said after the obligatory prayers:
text.ar: وورد في الصحيفة العلويّة لتعقيب الفرائض :

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَشْغَلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَنْ سَمْعٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yashghaluhu sam`un `an sam`in

translation.en: O He Who is not distracted by a sound from hearing another sound!

segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yughallituhu alssa'iluna

translation.en: O He Who is not confused by the beseechers!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ ٱلْمُلِحِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man la yubrimuhu ilhahu almulihhina

translation.en: O He Who is not annoyed by the insistence of those who entreat Him persistently!
(Please do) Make me taste the nice flavor of Your pardon
and the sweetness of Your mercy and forgiveness.

text.en: You may also say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: وَتَقول أيضاً :

translation.en: O Allah, This is my prayer that I have just offered
on account of neither a need that You may have for it
nor a desire that You may have for it;
rather, it is only glorification of You, obedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَإِجَابَةً لَكَ إِلَىٰ مَا أَمَرْتَنِي بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ijabatan laka ila ma amartani bihi

translation.en: and response to You to carry out what You have ordered me to do.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ فِيهَا خَلَلٌ أَوْ نَقْصٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana fiha khalalun aw naqsun

translation.en: O my God: If there is a defect or a deficiency in my prayer,
whether in the genuflection or the prostration;
then, (please) do not reproach me for it;
rather, confer upon me with Your acceptance (of it) and forgiveness (of me).

text.en: After accomplishment of the ritual prayers, you may also say the following supplicatory prayer, which the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) taught to Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) for developing memory:
text.ar: وَتَدعو أيضاً عقيب الصلوات بهذا الدعاء الذي عَلَّمَهُ النَّبيِّ صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله أميرَ المؤمنين عليه‌السلام للذّاكرة :

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَعْتَدي عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la ya`tadi `ala ahli mamlakatihi

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not treat the people of His realm with transgression!

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ مَنْ لاَ يَأْخُذُ أَهْلَ ٱلأَرْضِ بِأَلْوَانِ الْعَذَابِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man la ya'khudhu ahla al-ardi bi-alwani al`adhabi

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who does not inflict on the inhabitants of the earth various sorts of torture!
Glory be to the Affectionate, the Merciful!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجَعلْ لِي فِي قَلْبِي نُوراً وَبَصَراً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li fi qalbi nuran wa basaran

translation.en: O Allah, (please) fill my heart with illumination, discernment,
(faculty of) understanding, and knowledge.
Verily, You have power over all things.

text.en: Al-Kaf’ami, in his book of al-Misbah, cites that it is advisable to repeat the following supplicatory prayer three times after obligatory prayers:
text.ar: وَقالَ الكفعمي في (المصباح) : قُل ثلاث مَرات عقيب الصلوات :

translation.en: I seek for myself, my religion,
my family members, my possessions,

segments.transliteration: wa waladi wa ikhwani fi dini

translation.en: my descendants, my brethren-in-faith,

segments.transliteration: wa ma razaqani rabbi wa khawatima `amali

translation.en: all sustenance that my Lord has provided to me as sustenance, the results of my deeds,
and whomever I may concern about,
(I seek for all these) the protection of Allah, the Single,
the One, and the eternally Besought of all

segments.transliteration: alladhi lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: Who begets not, nor is He begotten;

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and the like of Whom there is none.
And [I seek the protection of] the Lord of the dawn
from the evil of what He has created,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqaba

translation.en: the evil of the utterly dark night when it comes,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri alnnaffathati fi al`uqadi

translation.en: the evil of those who blow on knots,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri hasidin idha hasada

translation.en: and the evil of the envious when he envies.
And [I seek the protection of] the Lord of men,
the King of men,
the God of men,
from the evil of the whisperings of the slinking (Satan),
who whispers into the hearts of men
from among the jinn and the men.

text.en: It is narrated in an inscription handwritten by Shaykh al-Shahid that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) said: Whoever desires that Almighty Allah will not show him his evildoings (that he did in this world) on the Resurrection Day and will not open the record of his evildoings, should say the following supplicatory prayer after each obligatory prayer:
text.ar: وعن خطّ الشيخ الشهيد : أن رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قالَ : مَن أراد أن لايطلعه الله يَومَ القيامة على قبيح أعماله ولا يفتح ديوان سيئاته فليقل بَعدَ كُل صلاة :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ مَغْفِرَتَكَ أَرْجَىٰ مِنْ عَمَلِي

translation.en: O Allah, Truly, I hope for Your forgiveness more than I trust my deed.

segments.transliteration: wa inna rahmataka awsa`u min dhanbi

translation.en: Your mercy is verily more expansive than my sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنْ كَانَ ذَنبِي عِنْدَكَ عَظِيماً

translation.en: O Allah, If my sin is grave in Your view,
then Your pardon is greater than my sin.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ أَهْلاً أَنْ أَبْلُغَ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma in lam akun ahlan an ablugha rahmataka

translation.en: O Allah, If I do not deserve to attain Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: farahmatuka ahlun an tablughani wa tasa`ani

translation.en: then Your mercy is so liberal that it can reach and include me,
because it has included all things;
[Let it be] by Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Ibn Baabwayh (i.e. Shaykh al-Saduq) holds that one should say the following litany immediately after uttering Tasbih al-Zahra’:
text.ar: وعَن ابن بابويه رض قالَ : إِذا فرغت مِن تسبيح الزهراء (صَلَواتُ الله عَلَيهاِ) فَقُل :

translation.en: O Allah, You are the [source of] peace,
peace is coming from You,
peace is for You,
and to You does peace belong.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

translation.en: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
Peace be on the messengers.
All praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Peace be upon you, O Prophet.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
Peace be upon the Imams; the guides and well-guided.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَنْبِيَاءِ ٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَمَلاَئِكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala jami`i anbya'i allahi wa rusulihi wa mala'ikatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon all Prophets, Messengers, and angels of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ عِبَادِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah.
Peace be upon `Ali, the Commander of the Believers.
Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two chiefs of all the youth of Paradise.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn, the Adornment of the Worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ بَاقِرِ عِلْمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali, the splitter of the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad, the veracious.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ٱلْكَاظِمِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Musa the son of Ja`far, the suppressor of rage.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ ٱلرِّضَا

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of Musa, the amiable.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْجَوَادِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali, the magnanimous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْهَادِي

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of Muhammad, the guide.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلزَّكِيِّ ٱلْعَسْكَرِيِّ

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali, the bright and resident of `Askar.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُجَّةِ بْنِ ٱلْحَسَنِ ٱلْقَائِمِ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّ
